head: Business Controller, pipeline
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 3 周前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description

H&M Production is the place where design ideas are transformed into actual products. We are in over 20 sourcing markets and are the direct point of contact for local suppliers. We work to ensure our products are of good quality and produced at the best price and in a sustainable way.
As a
Business Controller
at H&M Production, you will partner with Managers of your respective business scope and use data driven insights to co-create goals and activities that give directions to business teams. You
drive business results
by securing seasonal methods and routines and respond in an agile way to any changes in the business landscape. You
build analytical tools, set, and define KPIs
and closely monitor related activities and goals with important stakeholders across the globe.
Key responsibilities:
Drive seasonal strategy and methods for our supply chain.
Develop analytical tools and KPIs to support decision making.
Collaborate with various functions to drive optimization.
Qualifications
To succeed as a
Business Controller
, you proactively identify business opportunities and risks through conducting
proactive data analysis
and
translating into actional steps
, enabling business teams to make decisions and challenge the status quo. You
stand up for your ideas
, while you are
open to others’ perspectives
, to look for the best solutions for the company. You
use technology
and
adopt new ways of working
to enable business success across the controlling and production community. You are a
strong communicator
and collaborate
beyond your immediate team. You always seek to develop and motivate the people around you. You act as an
informal leader
by being a role model of H&M Group Leadership expectation.
What you need to succeed:
Have 3-5 years of experience as a Business Controller, Business Analysts or similar.
Have a degree in Business Administration, Engineering, Sustainability or similar.
Have advanced knowledge in Excel, Power BI or other Data Visualization tools.
Have creative analytical skills and are good at prioritizing.
Have a strategic mind and good at identifying new opportunities.
Additional Information
This is a fulltime permanent position, starting as soon as possible according to agreement. The role is an on-site position, based in our office in Shanghai, China.
Apply by sending in your
CV in English
as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through career page.
1. Drive seasonal strategy and methods for our supply chain.
2. Develop analytical tools and KPIs to support decision making.
3. Collaborate with various functions to drive optimization.
1. Have 3-5 years of experience as a Business Controller, Business Analysts or similar.
2. Have a degree in Business Administration, Engineering, Sustainability or similar.
3. Have advanced knowledge in Excel, Power BI or other Data Visualization tools.
4. Have creative analytical skills and are good at prioritizing.
5. Have a strategic mind and good at identifying new opportunities.
company_description: The job focuses on business controlling with responsibilities like driving business results, building analytical tools, setting KPIs, and collaborating across functions. It emphasizes business strategy, data analysis, and stakeholder management, aligning with business analysis rather than pure data roles.

head: 高级商业/数据分析师 Strategy Optimization Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 3 天前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
DIDI IBG (International Business Group) Marketplace,Marketplace Strategy,Strategy Optimization
高级数据/商业分析师 职位链接：https://talent.didiglobal.com/social/p/52959
工作地点：上海静安区灵石路718号滴滴百川大厦
【关于我们】
滴滴自2018年初收购巴西出行平台99开始，正式启动了国际化战略。目前，滴滴的国际业务覆盖了拉美、亚太和非洲的14个国家，为当地市场提供以出行为主、涵盖外卖和金融的多样化服务。
【关于team】
我们是滴滴国际化交易策略优化团队。作为滴滴最重要的增长方向之一，国际化出行业务，我们专注于深入分析国际化交易策略和产品策略。通过应用机器学习、数学建模和因果推断等先进方法，我们致力于策略的创新孵化、迭代与适配分析，以推动策略落地并解决区域性问题。我们的团队拥有包容、年轻和多元的文化。同时，我们为团队成员提供完善的培养机制和广阔的发展空间。
【岗位职责】
• Explore theoretical analysis of supply-demand equilibrium in the micro-level spatial temporal dimension
• Build statistical, optimization, and machine learning models for a range of applications
• Use data to understand product performance and to identify opportunities
• Present findings to senior management to inform business decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams across disciplines to drive system development end-to-end from idealization to production
【任职资格】
• Master's degree (highly preferred) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering or similar disciplines
• 1-5 yr working experience in top consulting/major technology companies
• Knowledge of underlying mathematical foundations of statistics, machine learning, optimization, economics, and analytics
• Strong analytical capability and problem-solving skills
skills in data analytics and experience in data-driven operation management preferred
• Strong business communication and influencing skills in both English and Chinese
• Mission-driven entrepreneurship
company_box_content: DiDi Global Inc. is a leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and other global markets, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, designated driving, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as certain energy and vehicle services, food delivery, and intra-city freight services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry, and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental, and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive, and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.
展开
company_description: A leading mobility technology platform offering ride-hailing, taxi, delivery, and other services across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and Africa. It uses AI and smart transportation innovations to build a sustainable ecosystem for future cities.

head: 高级数据分析师 (Marketplace Diagnosis)
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 天前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
【关于我们】
滴滴自2018年初收购巴西出行平台99开始，正式启动了国际化战略。目前，滴滴的国际业务覆盖了拉美、亚太和非洲的14个国家，为当地市场提供以出行为主、涵盖外卖和金融的多样化服务。

Join our dynamic Marketplace Team in China where you'll leverage data to uncover insights that shape our marketplace strategies and enhance our customer experience. If you're passionate about transforming data into actionable solutions and want to contribute to a purpose-driven organization, we want to hear from you! Together, let's create a brighter future through informed decision-making and innovative analytics.
Apply now and be part of our journey!
【About the team】
我们是滴滴国际化交易市场诊断团队。国际化出行业务作为滴滴最重要的增长方向之一，我们深入其最核心的交易市场方向，运用机器学习、算法、因果推断等量化模型，解决各个区域的资源分配&收益管理问题，闭环产出方案、落地策略。团队包容、年轻、多元。团队有着完善的培养机制、足够的空间等着你来大展拳脚！
Job Responsibility,
• Conduct diagnostic research in macro supply & demand and user persona to achieve business goals
• Develop & align core decision-making frameworks across multi-functional teams, and propose feasible strategies
• Facilitate quantitative analysis to support regional operation
• Present analytical results to the leadership team
• Collaborate with other teams to implement & evaluate tests in order to understand different strategy use-cases and refine framework by scenarios
Qualification,
• Master's degree (highly preferred) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering or similar disciplines
• 1 - 5 year's experiences working in data science or business analytics related field
• GPA - 3.5 or higher is preferred
• Strong proficiency in query language (e.g. SQL) and programming skills (e.g. Python, R)
• Knowledge in Machine Learning, Causal Inference and Optimization Methodology is a plus
• Strong presentation skills in Mandarin and English

head: Senior Associate, Vertical Planning and Operations (Operations related)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Klook
We are Asia’s leading platform for experiences and travel services, and we believe that we can help
bring the world closer together through experiences

Founded in 2014 by 3 avid travelers, Ethan Lin, Eric Gnock Fah and Bernie Xiong, Klook inspires and enables more moments of joy for travelers with over half a million curated quality experiences ranging from the biggest attractions to paragliding adventures, iconic museums to rich cultural tours, and other convenient local travel services across 2,700 destinations around the world.

Do you share our belief in the wonders of travel? Our international community of over 1,800 employees, based in 30+ locations, certainly do! Global citizens ourselves, Klookers are not only curating memorable experiences for others but also co-creating our world of joy within Klook.
We work hard and play hard, upkeeping our high-performing culture as we are guided daily by our 6 core values:
Customer First
Push Boundaries
Critical Thinking
Build for Scale
Less is More
Win as One
We never settle, and together, we believe in achieving greater heights and realizing endless possibilities ahead of us in the dynamic new era of travel. Care to be a part of this revolution? Join us!
What you’ll do:
Support commercial and service-level performance for travel product verticals globally.
Product Onboarding & Configuration: Assist in onboarding new products and configuring backend systems to ensure smooth operations and user experience
Content Operations: Support in writing, formatting, and managing operational content across platforms (no creative writing required)
Tool & System Usage: Operate various internal and external tools to carry out daily operations – we value fast learners!
User Experience Optimization: Help evaluate and improve the booking experience through testing and user journey tracking
User Research: Conduct user interviews and surveys, and analyze findings to generate actionable insights
Strategy Execution: Work closely with senior planning members to support topline and bottom-line growth for the vertical
What you'll need:
Fast learner who can pick up new systems and tools quickly
Strong sense of ownership, responsibility, and attention to detail
Highly adaptable in fast-changing environments, with a can-do attitude
Proactive, eager to learn, and comfortable with ambiguity
Team player who communicates openly and collaborates effectively
Good command of written and spoken English & Chinese
Analytical mindset and confidence working with data for insights and actions will be a plus

Klook is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We hire talented and passionate people of all backgrounds. We believe that a joyful workplace is an inclusive workplace, one where employees from all walks of life have an equal opportunity to thrive. We’re dedicated to creating a welcoming and supportive culture where everyone belongs.

Klook does not accept unsolicited resumes from any temporary staffing agency, placement service or professional recruiter (“Agency”). Klook will not be responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions or other payments related to such unsolicited resumes.

An Agency must obtain advance written approval from Klook’s Talent Acquisition Team to submit resumes, and then only in conjunction with a valid fully-executed agreement for service and in response to a specific job opening for which the Agency has been requested to submit resumes for. Klook will not be responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions or other payments to any Agency that does not have such agreement in place or does not comply with the foregoing.
1. Customer First
2. Push Boundaries
3. Critical Thinking
4. Build for Scale
5. Less is More
6. Win as One
1. Product Onboarding & Configuration: Assist in onboarding new products and configuring backend systems to ensure smooth operations and user experience
2. Content Operations: Support in writing, formatting, and managing operational content across platforms (no creative writing required)
3. Tool & System Usage: Operate various internal and external tools to carry out daily operations – we value fast learners!
4. User Experience Optimization: Help evaluate and improve the booking experience through testing and user journey tracking
5. User Research: Conduct user interviews and surveys, and analyze findings to generate actionable insights
6. Strategy Execution: Work closely with senior planning members to support topline and bottom-line growth for the vertical
1. Fast learner who can pick up new systems and tools quickly
2. Strong sense of ownership, responsibility, and attention to detail
3. Highly adaptable in fast-changing environments, with a can-do attitude
4. Proactive, eager to learn, and comfortable with ambiguity
5. Team player who communicates openly and collaborates effectively
6. Good command of written and spoken English & Chinese
7. Analytical mindset and confidence working with data for insights and actions will be a plus
company_box_content: Klook is a leading pan-regional experiences platform in Asia Pacific, purpose built to digitalize experiences and make them accessible to every traveler. Our mission is to build the digital infrastructure for the global experience economy — empowering merchants to share their passions and travelers to discover the heartbeat of each destination. We operate a mobile-first, curated platform featuring diverse experiences across global destinations.

head: Business Intelligence Manager Asia Pacific Region
info: 中国 上海市 · 5 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
The Company
Phibro Animal Health Corporation (PAHC)

is a publicly traded, global organization with a rich history in animal health and nutrition as a manufacturer and marketer of medicated feed additives, vaccines, nutritional specialty products, and mineral nutrition. We strive to be a trusted partner with livestock producers, farmers, veterinarians, and consumers who raise or care for farm and companion animals by providing solutions to help them maintain and enhance the health of their animals.

Phibro is a diversified company. In addition to animal nutrition and health, we manufacture and market products for ethanol performance, microbials for plants, home and industrial applications, and specialty chemicals for various industrial markets.
Phibro’s revenues are in excess of $1 billion and are supported by over 2,300 employees worldwide.
Asia Pacific is a strategic area of focus and growth for PAHC.
The Challenge
PAHC seeks to hire a strong
Business Intelligence Manager

to lead the development, implementation, and optimization of CRM and marketing analytics projects across the Asia Pacific Region covering four sub-regions: Greater China, South East Asia, Australia and New Zealand, and South Central African Region. The role will focus on leveraging data-driven insights to enhance customer engagement, improve sales forecasting, optimize marketing campaigns, and support strategic business decisions.
Major responsibilities:
CRM Project Management:
1. Lead the end-to-end implementation of the CRM project, from requirements gathering and system configuration to user training and post-implementation support.
2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including IT, Sales, Marketing, Finance, HR and Customer Service, to ensure seamless integration and alignment of the CRM system with business needs.
3. Define and document CRM project scope, goals, deliverables, and timelines.
4. Manage vendor relationships and ensure that project milestones and deliverables are met.
Data Analysis & Reporting:
1. Develop and maintain dashboards and reports that provide insights into customer behavior, sales performance, and marketing effectiveness.
2. Analyze large datasets to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement in CRM and marketing activities.
3. Provide actionable recommendations based on data analysis to support business growth and customer engagement strategies.
Marketing Analytics & Strategy:
1. Work closely with the marketing team to design and implement data-driven marketing strategies, including segmentation, targeting, and campaign performance analysis.
2. Collaborate with marketing teams to achieve successful execution and optimization of marketing projects across the region.
3. Measure the ROI of marketing campaigns and provide insights to optimize future initiatives.
4. Support the development of regional marketing strategies by providing data-driven insights into market trends and customer behavior.
Stakeholder Management:
1. Serve as the primary point of contact for CRM and marketing analytics in the APAC region.
2. Communicate project status, insights, and recommendations to senior management and key stakeholders.
3. Ensure alignment of BI and CRM initiatives with overall business goals and objectives
Technical Expertise and Leadership:
1. Utilize advanced BI tools (e.g., Power BI) to analyze and visualize data.
2. Ensure data integrity and accuracy across all CRM and BI systems.
3. Collaborate with IT to ensure the BI infrastructure supports business requirements and scalability.
4. Provide functional guidance and support to internal customers on using CRM and BI tools to continuously improve work effectiveness and productivity.
5. Provide training and development opportunities to enhance individual and collective capabilities in CRM and marketing analytics.
6. Foster a culture of continuous improvement and innovation within APAC Region.
Continuous Learning & Passion for Information Systems:
1. Stay updated with the latest trends and technologies in business intelligence, CRM, and marketing analytics.
2. Demonstrate a proactive approach to learning new tools, methodologies, and systems to improve business outcomes.
3. Share knowledge and insights with the APAC team to drive innovation and best practices.
This position will be based in China or South East Asia, reporting directly to the Marketing Director Asia Pacific Region.
The Profile
The right candidate shall have a strong background in business intelligence, CRM systems, data analytics, and project management, along with a passion for continuous learning and information systems.
1. Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Data Science, Information Systems, or a related field. A master’s degree or relevant certification is a plus.
Experience:
1. Minimum 5 years’ experience in CRM management, business intelligence, or data analytics
2. Proven experience in managing CRM implementation projects and marketing analytics in a multi-country environment, preferably within the APAC region.
Skills:
1. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret complex data and translate it into actionable business insights.
2. Proficiency in BI tools (Power BI), CRM systems (Microsoft Dynamics 365 or Salesforce), Excel
3. Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage and influence stakeholders at all levels.
4. Fluency in both English and Chinese is required.
5. Ability to work effectively and manage multiple priorities.
Personal Attributes:
1. Passion for information systems and continuous learning
2. Enjoys problem-solving and has a proactive approach to finding solutions.
3. Strong team player who thrives in a collaborative, dynamic, and fast-paced work environment
4. Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to build positive relationships across departments, countries and regions.
5. Flexible and adaptable to changing business needs and priorities.
6. Proficiency in additional languages relevant to the APAC region is a plus.
The Reward

If you enjoy autonomy and agility besides a caring and result-oriented culture, Phibro is the right place for you. We value integrity and professionalism, ownership and accountability, as well as collaboration as one team. We certainly offer competitive remuneration package and ample development challenges to our employees.
If you’re keen to explore this opportunity, please contact Lily Xu, HR Director Asia Pacific Region at lily.xu@pahc.com, or Calie Lee, Marketing Director Asia Pacific Region at calie.lee@pahc.com.
company_box_content: Our story begins with a goal of contributing to a healthy, affordable food supply by helping farmers responsibly care for their animals. With determination and integrity, we have grown into a global company. More than 2,300 employees strong, our team values the trust placed in our products and our people.

Our commitment to excellence is demonstrated every day by members of our team, who like to say, “it’s just what we do” when really… it is who we are. Our broad portfolio of products, backed by in-house manufacturing, innovative research and exceptional service, are the core of our partnerships with farmers, ranchers and veterinarians. With a growing line of natural, sustainably produced products, we offer responsible solutions to help support the health of all animal species, including cattle, poultry, swine and aquaculture.

Our future looks extremely bright, guided by the same commitment to integrity and hard work that brought us to where we are today. Our beliefs and responsibilities, shared below, are core to our operations each and every day.
Purpose: Optimize animal health and nutrition for better lives and a more sustainable world.
Mission: Provide safe and effective solutions for our customers'​ unique challenges.
Beliefs: At Phibro Animal Health Corporation we believe in:
- Keeping Animals Healthy
- Doing the Right Thing
- Focusing on Our Customers
- Continuous Investment in Our People
- Success is Built on a Passion for Excellence
- Individuals Make an Impact
展开
company_description: A global animal health and nutrition company with over 2,300 employees and revenues exceeding $1 billion. It provides medicated feed additives, vaccines, and specialty products, focusing on animal health, sustainability, and customer solutions.

head: Deep Learning Researcher | Trading Team
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 12 小时前 · 79 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Jump Trading Group is committed to world class research. We empower exceptional talents in Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science to seek scientific boundaries, push through them, and apply cutting edge research to global financial markets. Our culture is unique. Constant innovation requires fearlessness, creativity, intellectual honesty, and a relentless competitive streak. We believe in winning together and unlocking unique individual talent by incenting collaboration and mutual respect. At Jump, research outcomes drive more than superior risk adjusted returns. We design, develop, and deploy technologies that change our world, fund start-ups across industries, and partner with leading global research organizations and universities to solve problems.

The quantitative trading teams at Jump Trading probe and examine the global markets, seeking to understand the complexities of various traded products and exchanges. They leverage their impeccable statistical analysis, machine learning and deep learning skills, using the results of their research to make forecasts and develop profitable predictive trading models.
What You’ll Do:

We are seeking research scientists with a demonstrated ability to apply deep learning to achieve state-of-the-art capabilities in complex and challenging domains. The ideal person for this role will be capable of implementing an open-ended research project from concept to production and continuously improving model design, tools, and infrastructure. Potential projects may target any area of the quantitative research and monetization process. We believe that successful research efforts require a fluid mix of skills including ML expertise, engineering pragmatism, statistics and market intuition.
Skills You’ll Need:
At least 5+ years of experience in developing DL systems with measurable impact in industry and/or academia.
Creative thinkers who are driven, self-motivated, and eager to solve challenging problems.
Proficiency in Python and/or C++.
Strong foundation in mathematics and statistics.
Ability to thrive in a collaborative, team-oriented environment.
PhD, or Master's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, (or related subject).
Strong publications record at ICML, ICLR, AAAI, NeurIPS, UAI, KDD, or equivalent.
Reliable and predictable availability.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
1. At least 5+ years of experience in developing DL systems with measurable impact in industry and/or academia.
2. Creative thinkers who are driven, self-motivated, and eager to solve challenging problems.
3. Proficiency in Python and/or C++.
4. Strong foundation in mathematics and statistics.
5. Ability to thrive in a collaborative, team-oriented environment.
6. PhD, or Master's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, (or related subject).
7. Strong publications record at ICML, ICLR, AAAI, NeurIPS, UAI, KDD, or equivalent.
8. Reliable and predictable availability.
9. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
company_description: The role focuses on deep learning research for trading, requiring expertise in AI, machine learning, and statistical modeling. It involves developing predictive models and algorithms, aligning with data science due to its emphasis on advanced ML and research applications.

head: Analyst - CN
info: 中国 北京市 · 5 个月前 · 52 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Us

Aarki is an AI company that builds advertising solutions to drive mobile revenue growth. We use AI to find audiences in a privacy-first world using trillions of contextual bidding signals coupled with proprietary behavioral models. Our audience engagement platform includes a full-service agency team and a Unified Creative Strategy that delivers ad creative ideation and execution.

We have worked with hundreds of advertisers over 14 years and see 5M mobile ad requests per second from over 10B devices, driving performance for publishers and brands. The company is headquartered in San Francisco, CA, with offices in the United States, EMEA, and APAC.
Role Overview

As an Analyst at Aarki, Inc., you will play a critical role in driving data-driven decision-making processes and optimizing our advertising strategies. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to analyze large datasets, uncover actionable insights, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our advertising campaigns. Your expertise in data analysis and your ability to communicate findings effectively will be essential in shaping our success.
This role requires in-office presence five (5) days a week and will be based in our office in
Beijing, China.
Responsibilities
1. Run campaign optimization, data trend analysis, and missing opportunity analysis to identify areas of improvement and growth for assigned accounts.
2. Collaborate with key members of the Product, Data Science, Engineering, and Business Development teams by providing data-driven insights and recommendations.
3. Drive growth of the organization through analytical and business development projects.
4. Own analytics-related conversations with clients and drive success for the assigned accounts.
Skills & Experience
1. Graduate of Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering, Computer Science, or any other analytical field.
2. 2-5 years of hands-on analytics experience in the programmatic media advertising/ad tech industry.
3. Comfortable in a fast-paced startup environment.
4. Experience using BI tools (Tableau, Sisense, etc.).
5. Foundational knowledge and experience using SQL, Python, R, and related data query tools.
company_box_content: Aarki is an AI company that builds advertising solutions to drive mobile revenue growth. We use AI to find audiences in a privacy-first world using a massive-scale of contextual bidding signals coupled with proprietary behavioral models. The platform also includes a full service agency team and unified creative strategy that delivers ad creative ideation and execution. Aarki has worked with hundreds of advertisers over 14 years and sees 5M ad requests per second from over 10B devices. It is privately held headquartered in San Francisco with offices across the US, EMEA, and APAC.
展开
company_description: An AI company specializing in advertising solutions for mobile revenue growth, using contextual bidding and behavioral models. With 14 years of experience, it handles 5M ad requests per second from over 10B devices, focusing on data-driven ad optimization.

head: Risk Strategy Analyst
info: 中国 香港特别行政区 · 5 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Risk Strategy Analyst
About the job

KuCoin is leveraging cutting-edge technologies to create services that improve accessibility to the blockchain revolution. As an exchange for, by, and of the people, KuCoin is developing a community where everyone can benefit from growth and have their opinions heard.
As we continue to expand our product suite and global presence, we are looking for a motivated and professional individual to be the
Risk Strategy Analyst

driving our risk management and crypto merchant business globally. This is an opportunity to contribute to the long-term growth potential of KuCoin’s exchange business and to develop the business cases for emerging exchange products. Your work will be visible to management as you will drive a key market in a fast-growing business vertical.
Job Responsibilities:
1. Familiar with crypto industry and products, and will be responsible for risk management
2. Capable of completing risk strategy analysis, implementation, and monitoring
3. Generate risk indicators, monitor biz and product daily operation data
Job Qualifications
1. 3 years + payment or financial company working experience, preferably major in economics, finance, mathematics, statistics, computer science
2. Data driven, must familiarize with Python, R, SQL
3. Familiar with machine learning algorithms and its applications
4. Good at communication, and willing to learn, passionate in crypto
We offer
- Wide scope of work during KuCoin’s expansion in the above regions
- Breadth of opportunities in one of the fastest-growing industries spanning finance, tech, crypto, web3, and the metaverse
- Opportunities to involved in the most innovative crypto-payment related product development.
- Opportunities to develop the high-graded social network
- Clear development roadmap with business incorporation & development budget
- Result Driven, Competitive package, and other incentives
**Note: Please provide a short video of introduction and the CV need to be in English.
company_box_content: Founded in 2017, KuCoin is a leading global crypto platform built on trust. Renowned for its reliability, it leverages advanced blockchain technology, liquidity solutions, and user protections to ensure a secure trading environment.

Serving over 40 million users in more than 200 countries and regions, KuCoin empowers the digital economy with innovative, compliant services, including access to 1,000+ digital assets, Web3 wallet, spot and futures trading, institutional wealth management, and crypto payments.

Its excellence is recognized by Forbes as a top crypto app and Hurun as a 2024 Global Unicorn. KuCoin holds SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001:2022 certifications for robust information security. In 2022, it raised $170 million total at a $10 billion valuation, affirming its stability.

Prioritizing compliance, KuCoin has secured five global licenses, including as the first exchange registered with India’s FIU. Led by CEO BC Wong since January 2025, it focuses on expansion, innovation, and top-tier security, fostering a transparent ecosystem for users to thrive.
** Material on this page is directed only at persons outside of the UK, and must not be acted upon by persons in the UK. **
展开
company_description: A leading global crypto exchange founded in 2017, serving over 40 million users in 200+ countries. It offers trading, Web3 wallet, and crypto payments, with a focus on security, innovation, and compliance in the blockchain industry.

company_box_content: 京东于2004年正式涉足电商领域，2018年，京东集团市场交易额接近1.7万亿元*。2019年7月，京东集团第四次入榜《财富》全球500强，位列第139位，是中国线上线下最大的零售集团。
2014年5月，京东集团在美国纳斯达克证券交易所正式挂牌上市，是中国第一个成功赴美上市的大型综合型电商平台。2015年7月，京东凭借高成长性入选纳斯达克100指数和纳斯达克100平均加权指数。
2019年前三个季度，京东集团净收入达4062亿元，非美国通用会计准则下（Non-GAAP）归属于普通股股东的净利润近100亿元，创历史最高纪录；研发投入超过130亿元，跃升为中国企业中对技术投入最多的公司之一。
京东集团定位于“以供应链为基础的技术与服务企业”，目前业务已涉及零售、数字科技、物流、技术服务、健康、保险、物流地产、云计算、AI和海外等领域，其中核心业务为零售、数字科技、物流、技术服务四大板块。
京东集团奉行客户为先 、诚信、 协作、 感恩 、拼搏 、担当的价值观，目标是成为全球最值得信赖的企业。
展开
company_description: A major Chinese e-commerce and retail group founded in 2004, with significant market presence and technological investments. It operates in retail, logistics, tech, and health, focusing on supply chain-based services and innovation.

head: Finance Product Manager(Relocate to Kuala Lumpur)
info: 中国 广东省 · 5 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Overview:

Bybit is a leading cryptocurrency derivatives exchange designed for professional traders. Launched in 2018, Bybit offers a seamless trading experience for users to trade perpetual contracts on cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ripple, and more. It provides a robust and secure platform for traders to engage in leveraged trading, allowing them to amplify their exposure to the crypto market.

Overall, Bybit is a comprehensive trading platform that caters to the needs of professional traders in the cryptocurrency market, offering advanced features, robust security, and responsive customer support
Job Responsibilities:
1. Demand Analysis and Design:
1. Collaborate with the finance team to understand and analyze customer requirements, transforming them into product functionalities and solutions.
2. Clarify cash flow and system integration requirements and design products that are easy to use and offer a smooth user experience.
1. Product Development and Implementation:
1. Work closely with the technology and operations teams to manage the entire product lifecycle, ensuring the product meets development milestones and is standardized according to the requirements.
1. Data Analysis and Continuous Optimization:
1. Analyze product data and user feedback, conduct product performance analysis, and generate reports.
2. Use insights to drive continuous improvements and product upgrades based on data-driven recommendations.
Job Requirements:
1. Bachelor’s degree or higher, preferably in finance, economics, or related fields.
2. 3-5 years of experience in financial product management.
3. Familiarity with financial systems and operations, and a strong understanding of product design and user experience.
4. Strong cross-departmental collaboration skills and the ability to drive product innovation in a fast-paced environment.
5. Proficiency in data analysis and the use of relevant analytical tools.
company_box_content: Bybit 成立于 2018 年 3 月，如今已发展成为业界领先的加密货币交易所，为个人和机构交易者量身打造了一系列加密货币服务和产品解决方案。作为全球千万用户的信赖之选，Bybit 持续突破创新疆界，不断对多元化产品服务进行迭代升级。
Bybit 致力于打造一个安全可靠、公开透明的交易平台，让投资者能够轻松探索充满魅力的加密货币世界。无论是进行现货或衍生品交易，探索挖矿和质押产品，还是利用 API 进行算法交易，Bybit 都能满足您的需求，让您掌控自己的加密货币之旅。
作为迅速发展的 Web3 赛道的先行者，Bybit 推出和孵化了一系列创新型加密货币项目、去中心化解决方案和数据驱动型研究，为加密货币的普及和发展搭建了一个繁荣的生态体系。我们始终秉承换位思考、快速响应和持续改进的理念，这些价值观已渗透到我们运营的方方面面，创造了一个极具包容性的环境，使每个人都能得到充分的关注和赋能。
此外，Bybit 还积极与世界各地的监管机构合作，在构建强大的安全保障框架方面扮演了关键角色，为加密货币的稳健快速发展奠定了基石。
Bybit 志在成为您在加密货币之旅上的可靠伙伴，与您一起拥抱数字变革！
#TheCryptoArk #Bybit

head: Manager / Assistant Manager - CRM (Campaign Automation and Development)
info: 中国 澳门特别行政区 · 5 个月前 · 44 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description:

We are seeking a technically adept and marketing minded Manager (Campaign Automation and Development) to join our CRM team. This role is ideal for a candidate with a strong foundation in software architecture, API development, and data engineering, who can translate business needs into scalable, maintainable, and efficient technical solutions.

The successful candidate will lead the design and implementation of campaign automation systems, integrating APIs for content management and marketing channels, orchestrating workflows, and optimizing data pipelines. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure that technical solutions align with business objectives and deliver measurable impact.
Key Responsibilities
1. Architect and implement scalable software solutions for campaign automation, with a focus on modularity, maintainability, and performance
2. Design and develop data services to support campaign workflows and integrate with internal and external systems
3. Analyze business requirements and translate them into robust technical designs and workflow logic
4. Develop, test, and deploy reusable components using Python and SQL, ensuring high reliability and performance
5. Configure and manage Airflow environments for orchestrating ETL processes and campaign logic
6. Build and maintain data pipelines that support real-time and batch processing for CRM campaigns
7. Collaborate with business stakeholders to align technical solutions with strategic goals
8. Monitor system performance and proactively optimize workflows and APIs for scalability and efficiency
9. Troubleshoot complex issues across the software stack and provide expert-level support
10. Maintain comprehensive documentation of architecture, APIs, and workflow processes
Required Skills and Experience:
1. Proven experience in software architecture and API development, especially in Python-based environments
2. Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and workflow orchestration tools like Airflow
3. Experience designing and deploying RESTful APIs and integrating with third-party services
4. Familiarity with Linux environments, DevOps practices, and development tools such as VSCode
5. Solid understanding of ETL processes, data modeling, and pipeline optimization
6. Strong business acumen with the ability to align technical solutions with organizational goals
7. Flexibility and adaptability to handle changing priorities and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment
8. Excellent problem-solving skills and a proactive mindset for continuous improvement
9. Effective communication and collaboration skills across technical and non-technical teams
10. Proficiency in English and Cantonese/ Mandarin
Preferred Qualifications:
1. Bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field
2. Minimum 5 years of experience in software development, data engineering and data services, with a focus on business process optimization
3. Experience with marketing automation platforms, data visualization tools, and agile methodologies
4. Demonstrated success in driving process improvements and delivering business value through technology
5. Experience in the integrated resort or hospitality industry is a plus
***Less experienced will be considered as Assistant Manager
company_description: This role focuses on building and maintaining data infrastructure, with responsibilities including designing data services, building data pipelines, and orchestrating ETL processes using tools like Airflow. Keywords like data engineering, ETL, data pipelines, and Python/SQL for infrastructure development align with Data Engineering.

head: Database Administrator
info: 中国 · 5 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
ABOUT US
BIT is a full-featured cryptocurrency exchange that is designed for use by professionals, with advanced risk management and fund efficiency supported by Portfolio Margin and Unified Margin.

BIT was launched in August 2020 as a spinoff from Matrixport, a prominent crypto financial service company. BIT is one of the top crypto options trading platforms which offers innovative USD-margined trading pairs.
BIT is always striving to widen its selection of tokens, enhance its trading tools, and inspire the creation of innovative financial products.
ABOUT THE ROLE
Responsibilities:
1. Responsible for the operation and maintenance of databases such as MySQL, Redis, and ClickHouse, including performance tuning, troubleshooting, and general support.
2. Collaborate with development teams to design and implement database storage solutions that meet business needs.
3. Continuously learn and introduce new technologies and tools to support business growth.
4. Optimize cloud resource utilization to reduce operational costs.
Requirements:
1. Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
2. 2+ years of experience as a MySQL DBA.
3. Familiar with MySQL and Redis operations and internal principles.
4. Experience with AWS cloud platform is a plus.
5. Experience in maintaining data warehouse products such as ClickHouse, Doris, or Kafka is a plus.
6. Proficiency in Python or Shell scripting is a plus.

BIT was launched in August 2020 as a spinoff from Matrixport, a prominent crypto financial service company. BIT is one of the top crypto options trading platforms which offers innovative USD-margined trading pairs.

head: Analytics Engineer- Data Operations & Governance
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 68 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

1. Data Operations & Governance: Own the accuracy, reliability, and structure of product and user-event data through robust governance practices; Define and enforce standards for event tracking, data schemas, and documentation across teams; Conduct regular audits, validation checks, and coordinate instrumentation changes with engineering and product teams

2. Data Pipeline Development & Maintenance: Build and maintain scalable, observable data pipelines using tools like dbt, Airflow, or similar frameworks; Monitor pipeline health, implement alerting systems, and resolve data issues with root cause analysis; Optimize pipeline performance and ensure high availability of core datasets for analytics and reporting

3. Internal Tooling & Automation: Develop and maintain internal data tools, utilities, and dashboards using SQL, Python, and lightweight web technologies; Automate workflows to reduce manual reporting and improve operational efficiency for data stakeholders; Create reusable data models that support fast iteration and confident self-service analysis

4. Competitive Intelligence & Data Collection: Operate and enhance data scraping workflows to collect structured information on competitors, pricing, and market trends; Ensure scraping systems are stable, maintainable, and compliant with data privacy and ethical standards

1. Engineering Foundation: Strong SQL and working proficiency in Python or JavaScript for building and maintaining data infrastructure; Experience with modern data engineering tools (e.g., dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, Dagster); Familiarity with version control (Git), code modularization, and documentation practices

2. Data Quality & Governance Experience: Track record designing or maintaining data governance practices in product analytics environments (e.g., Segment, GA4, Mixpanel); Comfortable building QA checks, anomaly detection, and data validation processes; Familiarity with data governance education and data governance related stakeholder management

3. Operational Mindset: Comfortable being on point for data issues, debugging pipeline failures, and ensuring continuity in reporting and dashboards; Ability to set up alerting/logging mechanisms to proactively detect and respond to data problems

4. Collaboration & Communication: Strong written and verbal communication skills to align with product, engineering, and business teams; Able to translate business questions into engineering requirements and technical work into stakeholder-friendly language

5. Preferred Qualifications: Prior experience / knowledge on data science / machine learning; Prior experience on hands-on data engineering; Understanding of data operation & governance in analytics workflows; Experience supporting data for experimentation or A/B testing pipelines

We may use artificial intelligence tools to analyze the content of your Resume/CV against the specific requirements for the position. The purpose is to support our recruitment team in reviewing applications more effectively. These tools assist our recruitment team in their evaluation of your application by providing recommendations, but they do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans who consider the insights generated by the tools along with other relevant information. If you would like more details about how your personal information is processed, please contact us.
company_description: This role focuses on data operations, governance, and pipeline development using tools like dbt and Airflow. Responsibilities include building scalable data pipelines, ensuring data accuracy, and automating workflows, which are core to Data Engineering for maintaining data infrastructure and quality.

3. Internal Tooling & Automation: Develop and maintain internal data tools, utilities, and dashboards using SQL, Python, and lightweight web technologies; Automate workflows to reduce manual reporting and improve operational efficiency for data stakeholders; Create reusable data models that support fast iteration and confident self-service analysis

4. Competitive Intelligence & Data Collection: Operate and enhance data scraping workflows to collect structured information on competitors, pricing, and market trends; Ensure scraping systems are stable, maintainable, and compliant with data privacy and ethical standards

1. Engineering Foundation: Strong SQL and working proficiency in Python or JavaScript for building and maintaining data infrastructure; Experience with modern data engineering tools (e.g., dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, Dagster); Familiarity with version control (Git), code modularization, and documentation practices

2. Data Quality & Governance Experience: Track record designing or maintaining data governance practices in product analytics environments (e.g., Segment, GA4, Mixpanel); Comfortable building QA checks, anomaly detection, and data validation processes; Familiarity with data governance education and data governance related stakeholder management

3. Operational Mindset: Comfortable being on point for data issues, debugging pipeline failures, and ensuring continuity in reporting and dashboards; Ability to set up alerting/logging mechanisms to proactively detect and respond to data problems

4. Collaboration & Communication: Strong written and verbal communication skills to align with product, engineering, and business teams; Able to translate business questions into engineering requirements and technical work into stakeholder-friendly language

5. Preferred Qualifications: Prior experience / knowledge on data science / machine learning; Prior experience on hands-on data engineering; Understanding of data operation & governance in analytics workflows; Experience supporting data for experimentation or A/B testing pipelines

We may use artificial intelligence tools to analyze the content of your Resume/CV against the specific requirements for the position. Responsibilities include building scalable data pipelines and ensuring data quality, which are core to Data Engineering for maintaining data infrastructure and supporting analytics.

head: Senior Associate - Strategy and Corporate development
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 4 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Strategy and Corporate development – Senior Associate
About us
Abdul Latif Jameel is a diversified conglomerate founded in Saudi Arabia in 1945, operating across six strategic business sectors:

Mobility, Financial Services, Energy & Environment, Health, Diversified, and Investment. With a family of more than 11,000 employees in over 30 countries across six continents, our people are at the centre of all we do.

In the Asia Pacific region, our operations span across multiple markets such as Japan, China, India, Malaysia, Singapore, Australia, and New Zealand. In 2021, Abdul Latif Jameel established its Asia Pacific office based out of Singapore as part of its commitment to expand and to serve as a gateway to the fast-growing markets in the region.
About the role
Abdul Latif Jameel is seeking an exceptional, experienced and dynamic Senior Associate for our Strategy and Corporate Development team in its Mobility Sector.

This role is integral to driving strategic initiatives and fostering corporate growth through meticulous planning, analysis, and execution of key projects. The person will be part of the team that helps to chart and drive the medium to long term direction of the Mobility business in Abdul Latif Jameel. He / She will be a member of the team led by the Managing Director, Mobility Strategy and Corporate Development (who is based in Singapore).
The ideal candidate
1. Will be expected to drive projects and corporate tasks with relative supervision of a more senior member of the team

2. Must have a hands-on and detail-oriented behaviour, “go-get” and “from scratch to finish” way of working; from researching, performing analysis, to timely driving projects and people, as well as crafting, presenting, getting buy-ins of strategies from businesses leaders or driving business opportunities or corporate development topics – the candidate will have to oversee and be responsible for every detail.

3. Must have proven skills in communicating clearly, articulating complex ideas or concepts – both orally and by presentation. In particular, skills in crafting impactful (both visually and in content) presentation slides are a must have.

4. Will be a strategic thinker with a experience in corporate strategy, business development, and project management. Consulting and analytical toolkit from previous Corporate Strategy or consulting experience is a basic requirement – but is not enough.

5. Must excel in navigating both established and nascent organizational environments, securing buy-ins from decision-makers, and establishing and maintaining robust internal and external relationships. Proven abilities in EQ and must in diverse organizations are a must
6. Will need to possess background in Automotive and Mobility industry (ideally in the distribution segment). Other experience in other industry welcome but not a must.
As such, the ideal candidate should be an
all-rounder
, who features not only
acute analytical skills
but
knowledge or exposure in the Automotive industry
Key Responsibilities
(not exhaustive):
Strategic Planning and Execution:
1. Participate in development and implementation comprehensive strategic plans to achieve corporate goals and objectives.
2. Help managing of monthly, quarterly and annual strategy planning cycle, working with SBUs to develop and refine business strategies
3. Conduct market analysis to identify growth opportunities and potential risks.
4. Co-lead the evaluation of new business ventures, mergers, acquisitions, and partnerships.
5. Collaborate with senior leadership as well as corporate functions to align strategic initiatives with overall company vision and mission.
Corporate Development
1. Contribute to the process (due diligence etc.) for potential acquisitions and partnerships with the Corporate M&A and Business teams
2. Help develop and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including investors, partners, and industry experts.
Financial Analysis and Reporting
1. Conduct detailed financial analysis to support strategic decision-making.
2. Prepare comprehensive business cases, financial models, and investment proposals.
3. Monitor and report on the performance of strategic initiatives and corporate development projects.
Stakeholder Engagement:

1. Contribute in nurturing relationships and communicate effectively with internal and external stakeholders (e.g. government, consulting, experts, etc.) to ensure alignment and buy-in for strategic initiatives.
Organizational Navigation and Relationship Management
1. Secure buy-ins from key decision-makers for strategic initiatives.
2. Establish and maintain strong internal and external relationships to support corporate development efforts.
Qualifications
1. Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field
2. Minimum of 4-5 years of experience in corporate strategy, business development, or management consulting or equivalent
3. Experience in automotive industry, ideally in distribution of cars
4. Exposure in successful project management and strategic planning.
5. Experience in financial modelling and analysis.
6. Excellent communication and presentation skills.
7. Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and PowerPoint.
8. Skills in clear, clean and state of art slide design to ensure Powerpoint decks are impactful
9. Proficiency in using and leveraging AI tools
10. Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment with a strong emphasis on collaboration and innovation.
11. Fluent English required. Chinese or Arabic appreciated

Responsibilities include market analysis, business case development, and stakeholder engagement, which align with Business Analysis for driving business strategy and decision-making.

head: Talent Intelligence & Supply Chain Management Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 4 个月前 · 99 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
NEWLY CREATED ROLE - JOIN US TODAY
Location:
China (Flexible within Mainland China-preferable Shanghai)
About the Role:

Randstad Sourceright is seeking a dynamic and analytical professional to join our team in China. This unique dual-role opportunity offers a blend of market intelligence and supply chain management (SCM) responsibilities, supporting our talent solutions portfolio across RPO, MSP, and SOW programs.

The successful candidate will spend 50% of their time focused on talent intelligence, generating insights and market reports across multiple industry sectors, and 50% supporting the SCM desk, managing vendor relationships and performance in China.
This role plays a pivotal part in shaping data-driven decision-making for our clients in Life Sciences, High-Value Manufacturing, Banking & Financial Services, and ICT.
Key Responsibilities:
1. Talent Intelligence & Insights (50%)
1. Collect, analyze, and synthesize labor market data, salary trends, competitor intelligence, and workforce insights to create high-impact reports for internal and client use.
2. Develop sector-specific talent dashboards and insight packs aligned to the needs of clients in Life Sciences, HVM, BFSI, and ICT.
3. Provide strategic advisory support during program implementation and optimization phases.
4. Collaborate with global talent intelligence teams to localize global insights for the China market.
5. Present findings to internal stakeholders and clients to inform workforce planning and talent strategy.
2. Supply Chain Management Support (50%)
1. Act as the China-based point of contact for all vendor management activities under the SCM function.
2. Support vendor onboarding, contract compliance, rate management, and performance tracking.
3. Monitor and improve supplier performance metrics (e.g., fulfillment rates, time-to-fill, quality of hire).
4. Partner with the global SCM team to align vendor strategy with broader program goals and local market dynamics.
5. Support escalations, audits, and continuous improvement initiatives with our vendor base in China.
Key Relationships:
1. Dual reporting to APAC Heads of Talent Intelligence and SCM.
2. Day-to-day collaboration with the Enterprise China Country Head.
3. Frequent engagement with client-facing delivery teams, vendors, and cross-functional stakeholders globally.
Requirements:
1. Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Human Resources, Data Science, or related field.
2. 3–5+ years’ experience in talent analytics, market research, workforce insights, or supply chain/vendor management within the HR/talent acquisition space.
3. Familiarity with RPO, MSP, and SOW models is highly desirable.
4. Strong analytical and reporting skills using tools like Excel, Power BI, Tableau, or similar.
5. Excellent communication and presentation abilities, both in Mandarin and English.
6. Ability to navigate a matrixed environment and manage multiple stakeholders.
Apply Now

It focuses on generating insights and dashboards for decision-making, which aligns with Data Analysis for business insights.

head: TGT-Tech Genius Team
info: 中国 北京市 · 4 个月前 · 25 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
【for this position,Mandarin is required! Base in China Mainland!】
1、About JD.com

JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, has evolved from a pioneering e commerce platform into a leading technology and service provider with supply chain at its core. Renowned for its supply chain innovation and excellence, JD.com has expanded into sectors including retail, technology, logistics, healthcare, and more, aiming to transform traditional business models with cutting edge digital solutions. Ranked 47th on the Fortune Global 500, JD.com is China’s largest retailer by revenue. In 2023, JD.com reported revenues of US$152.8 billion and served approximately 600 million active customers.
2、TGT (Tech Genius Team）Program

Tech Genius Team (TGT) Program is a global technical talent initiative. We seek to collaborate with visionary technologists to explore cutting edge innovations through JD’s vast business ecosystems, leveraging technology to create meaningful societal impact.
TGT focuses on the most cutting edge topics with societal value. Our research areas include:
1）AI Infra

Responsible for the architecture design and optimization of JD.com's AI infrastructure, promoting the efficient implementation of deep learning frameworks in training and inference stages, and customizing development to meet business scenarios to enhance model performance and resource utilization, providing robust underlying support for JD.com's intelligent business operations.
2）Security AI

Focus on building a comprehensive security protection system for JD.com's platform, employing advanced algorithms and AI models to monitor and guard against various security threats in real-time, ensuring user data privacy and transaction security, and safeguarding the stable operation of the business, thereby fortifying the security line of defense for JD.com's e-commerce operations.
3）Big Data Platform Development and Optimization

Deeply involved in the construction and optimization of JD.com's big data platform, responsible for the collection, storage, processing, and analysis of massive amounts of data, mining data value to provide data support for business scenarios such as precision marketing, supply chain optimization, and user profiling, assisting JD.com in achieving data-driven decision-making and operations.
4）Multi-modal Large Model Development and Applications

Explore innovative applications of multi-modal large models in JD.com's business, such as product image recognition, video content understanding, and multi-modal recommendations. By integrating text, image, and voice data, enhance the model's perception and understanding capabilities to deliver a more intelligent and enriched shopping experience for users.
5）High-Performance Computing and Cloud Innovation

Dedicated to performance optimization and technological innovation of JD.com's cloud computing platform, building an efficient and reliable cloud infrastructure to support large-scale distributed computing and storage, meeting the growing business demand for computing resources while reducing operational costs, and driving the development of JD.com's business towards cloud-native.
6）Machine Learning and Sys Analytics

Conduct in-depth research and application of machine learning algorithms, targeting business scenarios such as user growth, risk control, and supply chain optimization at JD.com. Design and develop efficient predictive models and decision-making systems, providing precise insights and strategic recommendations through data mining and model optimization to enhance business efficiency and competitiveness.
7）World Foundation Models and Embodied AI

Investigate the application of spatial intelligence technologies in JD.com's logistics and warehousing scenarios, such as robot path planning and intelligent warehouse management. By constructing spatial perception and decision-making models, achieve automated and intelligent spatial operations to improve logistics efficiency and warehouse utilization, advancing the development of JD.com's smart logistics.
8）Search, Recommendation, and Advertising Optimization

Focus on algorithm optimization and innovation of JD.com's search, recommendation, and advertising systems, employing advanced machine learning, reinforcement learning, and deep learning techniques to enhance the accuracy of search results, relevance of recommendations, and effectiveness of ad placements, optimizing user experience and increasing the commercial value and user stickiness of the platform.
3、Eligibility
⚫Full time: Graduation dates between October 2023 September 2026.
⚫Internship: Graduation dates after September 2026.
⚫Open to all degree levels. Preferred majors include Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Mathematics, or related fields.
company_description: A leading Chinese e-commerce and technology company with over 600 million active customers, focusing on retail, logistics, healthcare, and AI infrastructure. It is ranked 47th on the Fortune Global 500 with revenues of US$152.8 billion in 2023.

head: Statistical Scientist
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 天前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

At Roche you can show up as yourself, embraced for the unique qualities you bring. Our culture encourages personal expression, open dialogue, and genuine connections, where you are valued, accepted and respected for who you are, allowing you to thrive both personally and professionally. This is how we aim to prevent, stop and cure diseases and ensure everyone has access to healthcare today and for generations to come. Join Roche, where every voice matters.
The Position
Job Description
Roche Data Scientists are essential leaders in driving and implementing a broad range of quantitative drug development strategies
they bring data to life and enable the organization to make the best possible data-driven decisions.
As a Data Scientist at Roche Pharma, you’ll actively shape the future of healthcare as a member of Data and Statistical Sciences (DSS) within Product Development (PD) and PD Data Sciences (PDD).
You will be responsible for the strategic and analytical activities of the molecules and devices in our pipeline on a level matching your seniority.

DSS activities span multiple therapeutic areas, a wide range of data types, and collaborations with a variety of experts, all with the goal to develop innovative healthcare solutions for patients and society.

Your responsibilities in support of our PDD products may include a wide variety of contributions: partnering with key stakeholders, working on the molecule portfolio, supporting specialized business areas, or contributing to key initiatives that shape our technical, business and healthcare environments. You may be a work product owner and leader, quantitative expert on a project team, or driver of key internal or external relationships.

Data Sciences Leadership
Accountable for the development and implementation of Data Sciences products

Lead and/ or support prioritization efforts, demonstrating urgency and taking smart risks to make considered decisions in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

communication
and implementation.

head: 运营分析专员/Operations Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description
Change the world. Love your job.

In your first year with TI, you will participate in the Career Accelerator Program (CAP), which provides professional and technical training and resources to accelerate your ramp into TI, and set you up for long-term career success. Within this program, we also offer function-specific technical training and on-the-job learning opportunities that will encourage you to solve problems through a variety of hands-on, meaningful experiences from your very first day on the job.
As an Operations Analyst, your role may be in one or more of these areas:
Inventory Operations: Set the operating plan to get the right products to our customers on time
focus on new products ramps and improving cycle times on existing products
work in tandem with manufacturing planning to execute the start plan.
Manufacturing Operations: Ensure start plan execution at factories
analyze factory optimization and monitor product support at key manufacturing sites

Customer Operations: Increase customer satisfaction by identifying weaknesses in customers' supply chain and implementing optimal supply chain solutions for each site/program/device. Learn customer's end business markets and utilize this knowledge to assist business forecasting and anticipating disruptions.

Logistics: Improving inbound/outbound transportation flows, along with optimizing the network of finished goods between factories and TI product distribution centers, and managing delivery of TI products directly to customers.
Put your talent to work with Texas Instruments!
Qualifications
Minimum requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Operations, Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain, Business Analytics or related field
Cumulative 3.0/4.0 GPA or higher
Fresh graduates or graduates with less than 2 years working experience
Preferred Qualifications
Ability to establish strong relationships with key stakeholders critical to success, both internally and externally
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Ability to quickly ramp on new systems and processes
Demonstrated strong interpersonal, analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work in teams and collaborate effectively with people in different functions
Ability to take the initiative and drive for results
Strong time management skills that enable on-time project delivery
About Us
Why TI?
Engineer your future. We empower our employees to truly own their career and development. Come collaborate with some of the smartest people in the world to shape the future of electronics.

We're different by design. Diverse backgrounds and perspectives are what push innovation forward and what make TI stronger. We value each and every voice, and look forward to hearing yours. Meet the people of TI
Benefits that benefit you. We offer competitive pay and benefits designed to help you and your family live your best life. Your well-being is important to us.
About Texas Instruments

Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) is a global semiconductor company that designs, manufactures and sells analog and embedded processing chips for markets such as industrial, automotive, personal electronics, communications equipment and enterprise systems. At our core, we have a passion to create a better world by making electronics more affordable through semiconductors. This passion is alive today as each generation of innovation builds upon the last to make our technology more reliable, more affordable and lower power, making it possible for semiconductors to go into electronics everywhere. Learn more at TI.com .
Texas Instruments is an equal opportunity employer and supports a diverse, inclusive work environment.
If you are interested in this position, please apply to this requisition.

1. Inventory Operations: Set the operating plan to get the right products to our customers on time; focus on new products ramps and improving cycle times on existing products; work in tandem with manufacturing planning to execute the start plan.
2. Manufacturing Operations: Ensure start plan execution at factories; analyze factory optimization and monitor product support at key manufacturing sites;.

3. Customer Operations: Increase customer satisfaction by identifying weaknesses in customers' supply chain and implementing optimal supply chain solutions for each site/program/device. Learn customer's end business markets and utilize this knowledge to assist business forecasting and anticipating disruptions.

4. Logistics: Improving inbound/outbound transportation flows, along with optimizing the network of finished goods between factories and TI product distribution centers, and managing delivery of TI products directly to customers.
1. Bachelor's degree in Operations, Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain, Business Analytics or related field
2. Cumulative 3.0/4.0 GPA or higher
3.  Fresh graduates or graduates with less than 2 years working experience
1. Ability to establish strong relationships with key stakeholders critical to success, both internally and externally
2. Strong verbal and written communication skills
3. Ability to quickly ramp on new systems and processes
4. Demonstrated strong interpersonal, analytical and problem-solving skills
5. Ability to work in teams and collaborate effectively with people in different functions
6. Ability to take the initiative and drive for results
7. Strong time management skills that enable on-time project delivery
1. Engineer your future. We empower our employees to truly own their career and development. Come collaborate with some of the smartest people in the world to shape the future of electronics.

2. We're different by design. Diverse backgrounds and perspectives are what push innovation forward and what make TI stronger. We value each and every voice, and look forward to hearing yours. Meet the people of TI

head: Listing Research Manager
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 2 个月前 · 45 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 公司审核时间通常为 1 周
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Overview:

OSL Group is looking for a Token Review Analyst based in Hong Kong. This person will play an important role in the Token Admission Process for both security and non-security tokens by working on the analysis and review for potential listing and subsequent monitoring. The ideal candidate will demonstrate passion for the blockchain industry/regulatory development and have excellent analytical / communication skills.
Job Responsibilities and Duties:
1. In depth research, review and coordinate external/internal resources to perform due diligence on the Tokens (both security and non-security) for potential listing.
2. Reviewing, monitoring, and reporting of tokens made available on OSL platform.
3. Reviewing, monitoring, and reporting on the latest blockchain industry development and regulatory requirements for virtual asset trading platforms globally and especially in Hong Kong.
4. Preparing updates and supporting information for communication with regulators.
5. Coordination and communication with projects and other service providers to achieve the task of token review in compliance with regulatory requirements.
6. Record keeping (including meeting minutes preparation) and documentation as part of the diligence process.
Job Requirements:
1. Education: Degree holder in any analytical discipline
2. Years of Experience: 5+ years (Experience and expertise in Defi a requirement)
3. Excellent command of written and spoken English and Chinese
4. Sufficient understanding of traditional finance and blockchain/digital asset ecosystems
5. Good analytical, critical thinking, and communication skills
company_description: A digital asset platform focusing on blockchain and virtual asset trading, particularly in Hong Kong. It provides services for security and non-security tokens, adhering to regulatory requirements and industry developments in the digital asset space.

As an
Insights Analyst Coordinator
on
Fight For the Golden Spatula (金铲铲之战)

team, you will make use of data sets to report on game health and product performance,helping game developers understand the opportunity and audience for their game. You will use your expertise in bridging data analysis with product strategy to share key takeaways to guide product improvement. You will report to the
Manager of Game Production
Responsibilities
Supporting Insight Lead in game health assessment, including but not limited to analyzing engagement,revenue,retention, and monetization metrics.
Support Insight Lead in conducting deep-dive product analysis to guide product strategy and answer key product/design questions.
Identify trends, risks, and opportunities through player segmentation and behavioral analysis.
Work with our partner in field studies and player research initiatives, output reports and do follow ups.
Drive competitive & market analysis, understand industry trends and competitor games, evaluate emerging monetization models (e.g., subscriptions, battle passes, ads).
Present results to audiences with a range of technical proficiencies, and communicate effectively with stakeholders about project progress and timelines.
Required Qualifications
Bachelor's degree in Economics, Engineering, Computer Science, Data Analysis or a related field.
Strong analytical skill set capable of defining problems, and developing innovative solutions utilizing appropriate methods and frameworks.
Strong collaboration skills, able to work with cross-functional teams and partners to align stakeholder needs, gather key information and drive results
Product-savvy mindset, understanding of game mechanics, F2P models, and player psychology.
Excellent interpersonal skills and ability to craft reports and presentations for non-technical audiences.
Strong ownership and can take initiative in defining the push things forward when facing ambiguous situations.
Proficiency in both English and Mandarin
Desired Qualifications
Familiarity with games or the gaming industry
Skills and Experiences with data visualization
2+ years of consultancy or analytics experience
Proficiency with Tableau and SQL, Python or similar language

For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players. We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games. If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this could be your role!
Employment Type: employment contract with FESCO Adecco, a professional personnel company in China.
1. Supporting Insight Lead in game health assessment, including but not limited to analyzing engagement,revenue,retention, and monetization metrics.
2. Support Insight Lead in conducting deep-dive product analysis to guide product strategy and answer key product/design questions.

4. Work with our partner in field studies and player research initiatives, output reports and do follow ups.
5. Drive competitive & market analysis, understand industry trends and competitor games, evaluate emerging monetization models (e.g., subscriptions, battle passes, ads).
6. Present results to audiences with a range of technical proficiencies, and communicate effectively with stakeholders about project progress and timelines.

Is this your next challenge in E-Commerce?

Do you have experience in Digital Product Management and E-Commerce?

The Group, including its associates, operates a portfolio of well-known brands across five key divisions: health and beauty, convenience, food, home furnishings, and restaurants.
DFI Retail Group is a member of the Jardine Matheson Group.
