head: Research Analyst - Power & Renewables, China
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Wood Mackenzie is the global data and analytics business for the renewables, energy, and natural resources industries. Enhanced by technology. Enriched by human intelligence. In an ever-changing world, companies and governments need reliable and actionable insight to lead the transition to a sustainable future. That’s why we cover the entire supply chain with unparalleled breadth and depth, backed by over 50 years’ experience. Our team of over 2,400 experts, operating across 30 global locations, are enabling customers’ decisions through real-time analytics, consultancy, events and thought leadership. Together, we deliver the insight they need to separate risk from opportunity and make confident decisions when it matters most.
WoodMac.com
Wood Mackenzie Brand Video
Wood Mackenzie Values
Inclusive – we succeed together
Trusting – we choose to trust each other
Customer committed – we put customers at the heart of our decisions
Future Focused – we accelerate change
Curious – we turn knowledge into action

We are looking for a Research Analyst to join Wood Mackenzie’s Power & Renewables team in China. Responsibilities will include conducting original quantitative and qualitative research on the market, and delivering this analysis to clients through written reports, presentations, public speaking, addressing specific customer enquiries and through the delivery of bespoke consulting engagements. You will help with expanding our regional power and renewable research using analytical or quantitative tools. You will aggregate and summarise project level datasets, track market activity, and forecast installation volumes and pricing trends. You will build strong ties with key industry stakeholders and engage with clients and prospects in collaboration with our sales team. You will collaborate with other Wood Mackenzie analysts covering power markets and renewable technologies and commodities in the region to ensure our analysis is robust, integrated and thought-provoking.
Knowledge, Skills And Experience
You have experience working in wind, renewables or power markets industry for 2-3 years.
You are passionate about renewable energy and come with strong knowledge of the sector and markets in China.
You have an analytical mindset and an eye for detail, and you can think outside the box and generate new ideas.
You are comfortable working with common Excel functions and query languages.
You have strong networking skills and can show that you can develop relationships with key industry stakeholders.
You can communicate new ideas and concepts to audiences in an engaging way, both verbally and in writing.
You are a strong team player and a natural self-starter who can work independently.
You are comfortable disrupting your routine, as you will constantly be looking to learn and provide in-depth analysis of industry trends and innovative market dynamics.
Equal Opportunities

We are an equal opportunities employer. This means we are committed to recruiting the best people regardless of their race, colour, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. You can find out more about your rights under the law at
www.eeoc.gov
If you are applying for a role and have a physical or mental disability, we will support you with your application or through the hiring process.
1. Inclusive – we succeed together
2. Trusting – we choose to trust each other
3. Customer committed – we put customers at the heart of our decisions
4. Future Focused – we accelerate change
5. Curious – we turn knowledge into action
1. You have experience working in wind, renewables or power markets industry for 2-3 years.
2. You are passionate about renewable energy and come with strong knowledge of the sector and markets in China.
3. You have an analytical mindset and an eye for detail, and you can think outside the box and generate new ideas.
4. You are comfortable working with common Excel functions and query languages.
5. You have strong networking skills and can show that you can develop relationships with key industry stakeholders.
6. You can communicate new ideas and concepts to audiences in an engaging way, both verbally and in writing.
7. You are a strong team player and a natural self-starter who can work independently.
8. You are comfortable disrupting your routine, as you will constantly be looking to learn and provide in-depth analysis of industry trends and innovative market dynamics.
company_box_content: In the middle of the energy transition, businesses and governments are faced with significant challenges. But the pace and scale of change mean every decision is made under mounting pressure.  Now, more than ever, companies need reliable data, analytics and actionable insight.

Wood Mackenzie is the leading global provider of data and analytics solutions for the renewables, energy and natural resources sectors . Wood Mackenzie’s services include data, analytics, insight, events and consultancy.  A trusted partner for over 50 years, Wood Mackenzie’s team has over 2,300 experts across more than 30 global locations who cover the entire supply chain. Wood Mackenzie’s data and analytics empowers energy producers, governments and financial institutions to be confident in their investment decisions in the face of rapidly evolving markets. Part of the Veritas group.
展开
company_description: A global data and analytics business for renewables, energy, and natural resources industries, with over 50 years of experience and 2,400 experts worldwide. The company provides insights through analytics, consultancy, and events to support sustainable decision-making.

2. Excellent communication skills. Have interview capability and cross-organizational communication skills.

head: Insights Manager – Foresights
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 1 个月前 · 82 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Principal Accountabilities

1. Manage the identification, design and deployment of research/insights projects within the insights programmes, ensuring stakeholder alignment and deploying appropriate methodologies in line with operating procedures.

2. Manage research & insights brief creation covering all mix elements, advising on business question/action standard definition & recommending appropriate marketing research design to ensure investment is ‘fit for purpose’.

3. Lead the project interface between internal stakeholders (usually brand marketing and/or R&D), research agency and the end-market(s) to ensure adequate project control and provide transparency and guidance to relevant stakeholders to complete projects OTIF.
4. Proactively generate actionable consumer insights and drive communication of these insights to key stakeholders

5. Act as a thinking partner to support and challenge product development thinking: deliver commercially sound, consumer centric thinking based on actionable insight to enable brand & platform development leading to competitive advantage and growth.
6. Proactively demonstrate excellence in analytical thinking and information synthesis, including knowledge and use of data platforms, with the aim to provide an evidenced-based point of view.
7. Drive methodological experimentation where appropriate to meet evolving business and insights needs to deliver consumer insight
8. Share research methodologies best practice and study outcomes across Global Strategy & Foresights and local SP&I to contribute to the continuous evolution of the function.
9. Tirelessly advocate for the consumer & their product / sensorial needs within marketing and the R&D teams
Additional Information
Context/ Environment

New Category products such as e-cigarettes, tobacco heating products and modern oral are a major component of BAT’s development of a range of products that provide much of the enjoyment of smoking without burning tobacco. Through NC, BAT is leading the transformation of the tobacco industry in one of the most dynamic periods of change that the industry has ever encountered.

1. BAT has recently heavily invested into its R&D function across the world to accelerate the breadth and deep of its innovation pipeline. The role of the newly created product foresights function is to:
1. Empower growth through shaping the innovation strategy based on robust consumer, market & business insight/foresight
1. Steer the delivery of the operational plan to effectively meet or exceed the evolving marketing environment & business needs
1. Identify and define new opportunities through expertly combining consumer trends, user-behaviour and understanding of the target consumer

1. This requires a deep understanding of consumers’ moments of need coupled with the ability to turn insight into commercial opportunities, where an insight is defined as a penetrating glimpse below the surface of consumer behavior, one that can be applied to unlock category growth.
Knowledge, Skills and Experience

The Consumer Insights Manager is an experienced consumer research & insights professional with broad category understanding and expertise in consumer understanding and behavior. He/She clearly understands and exploits the necessary interrelationships between functions required to be successful in the role.
Embrace key BAT values especially relevant for I&F, i.e. they need to demonstrate these tangibly and live by these values:
1. Love our Consumers
2. Do the right thing
3. Passion to Win
This role requires an individual with the following attributes and behaviors:
Skills & Experience Profile
1. Educated to degree level in an appropriate subject (Post Graduate Degree in Business Management would be preferable)
2. Strong marketing or market research experience in BAT or a blue-chip consumer goods company or a global market research agency or consultancy - ideally with managerial experience.
3. Proven experience working with technical R&D functions translating consumer opportunities into sharp technical briefs
4. Deeply curious about understanding Consumer behaviour & attitudes and how it relates to Innovation product development
5. Commercial & International marketing acumen (including digital), proven experience in innovation / up-stream strategy.
6. Broad understanding of the influence of macro and micro economic, business, environmental and consumer trends (tobacco and ex-category) and their relationships.
7. Possesses an expert knowledge of marketing and marketing research techniques, their application and limitations.
8. Highly proficient in analytics. Familiar with generic statistical tools and their application.
9. Demonstrable track record of delivering multi-country marketing research & insights projects that have influenced business or shaped strategy beyond merely market research project management.
Desired Behaviours & Attitudes
1. Proactive mindset, self-driven and motivated.
2. Comfortable in matrix organisations, works collaboratively and not fazed by ambiguity.
3. Structured & organised way of thinking.
4. Very strong interpersonal & communication skills, ability to modulate tone and message depending on agenda, stakeholder (seniority) and desired outcome.
5. Problem-solver mindset, constructive.
6. Committed to time scales & attentive to detail.
7. Honest, reliable and with high degree of personal integrity.
8. Treats confidential information with sensitivity & discretion.
9. Develops strong and effective people networks (across all levels of the organisation).
Key Success Factors
1. Builds a reputation as a credible & knowledgeable ‘consumer champion’ who can support business needs without being pedantic or over-technical.
2. Harnesses global insight findings (within category) & ex-category trends to build the emerging picture of the evolving consumer & competitor landscape.
3. Commits to the rigorous delivery of key projects that meet the business goals.

4. Is at ease with working collaboratively in a multi-cultural, multi-disciplinary and cross-functional environment; interacting effortlessly with different stakeholders to ensure timely and effective project outcomes.
5. Demonstrates an in-depth knowledge of BAT governance, operating procedures and methodologies.
6. Is curious, creative, courageous and can identify and communicate breakthrough consumer insights.
Working relationship
Internal / External
Internal
1. Global Insights & Foresights teams (Combustibles, New Categories)
2. New Categories Marketing (Category & Brand Directors, Brand Managers).
3. R&D Managers (e.g. Product Development, Sensory, etc.)
4. Key market Insights Managers
External
1. External research agencies up to Research Director
company_box_content: We are BAT, a leading global consumer goods company driven by a clear purpose: to create A Better Tomorrow™ by Building a Smokeless World.

Founded in 1902, we’ve grown into a truly international business, operating across six continents with a presence in over 180 markets. Our strategic ambition is to become a predominantly smokeless business by 2035**, helping adult smokers transition to scientifically substantiated, reduced-risk*† alternatives.

With a powerful portfolio of global brands, a future-focused strategy, and around 50,000 talented people worldwide, we are committed to accelerating Tobacco Harm Reduction and making cigarettes a thing of the past.
As a leading FTSE company, our operations span three key regions:
🌍 United States of America
🌍 Americas & Europe (AME)
🌍 Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa (APMEA)
Together, we are building A Better Tomorrow™.
* Based on the weight of evidence and assuming a complete switch from cigarette smoking. These products are not risk free and are addictive.

**Please refer to the cautionary statement contained in the Annual Report and Form 20-F 2024 on p.447 for additional information regarding BAT’s future performance: https://www.bat.com/ar/2024/index.html

† Our Vapour product Vuse (including Alto, Solo, Ciro and Vibe), and certain products, including Velo, Grizzly, Kodiak, and Camel Snus, which are sold in the U.S., are subject to FDA regulation and no reduced-risk claims will be made as to these products without agency clearance.
展开
company_description: A leading global consumer goods company founded in 1902, operating in over 180 markets with around 50,000 employees. It focuses on creating smokeless products and tobacco harm reduction, with a strategic ambition to become predominantly smokeless by 2035.

head: 咨询顾问
info: 中国 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 63 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
主要职责：
- 策略规划与模型构建：根据甲方客户业务目标和市场趋势，制定Marketing Mix Modeling的整体策略，设计并构建先进的营销组合模型，确保模型能够准确反映市场变化及营销活动对销售的直接和间接影响。
- Digital Advertising Rating（DAR）优化：领导团队深入研究数字广告市场，利用DAR技术评估广告平台、创意、受众定位等因素的表现，识别高效的广告策略与低效的投资领域，提出改进建议并推动实施，以最大化数字广告的投资回报率。
- 数据分析与洞察：运用统计分析和数据挖掘技术，定期分析营销数据，包括但不限于广告曝光量、点击率、转化率、成本效益比等关键指标，提炼出对业务增长有实质性影响的洞察，为管理层提供决策支持。

- 跨部门协作：与客户销售、市场、产品等部门紧密合作，确保Marketing Mix Modeling的成果能够有效融入公司整体战略中，同时协调资源，推动营销优化措施的执行。 团队管理与培养：负责团队建设与人才培养，建立高效的数据分析团队，提升团队成员的专业技能和数据分析能力，营造积极向上的工作氛围。 技术创新与升级：关注行业动态和最新技术趋势，不断探索并引入新的建模方法、工具和平台，持续提升Marketing Mix Modeling的准确性和效率。
任职要求：
- 拥有统计学、经济学、市场营销或相关领域的高级学位，具备扎实的理论基础。
- 至少3年以上Marketing Mix Modeling或相关领域工作经验。
- 精通数字广告评估方法，对DAR技术有深入理解和实践经验。
- 熟练掌握数据分析工具（如R、Python、SQL）和统计软件（如SAS、SPSS），具备强大的数据处理和分析能力。
- 出色的逻辑思维能力和问题解决能力，能够独立设计并实施复杂的分析项目。
- 优秀的沟通能力和团队合作精神，能够跨部门协调资源，推动项目落地。
- 对市场趋势保持高度敏感，具备较强的学习能力和创新能力。
company_description: This role focuses on marketing strategy, client collaboration, and business process improvement. Responsibilities include strategy planning, digital advertising optimization, and cross-department coordination to drive business growth.

head: Data Analyst Expert
info: 中国 · 重新发布时间: 2 天前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Note: 该岗位需要relocate；工作地点为阿联酋 阿布扎比
About Bybit

Established in March 2018, Bybit is one of the fastest growing cryptocurrency derivatives exchanges, with more than 70 million registered users. We offer a professional platform where crypto traders can find an ultra-fast matching engine, excellent customer service and multilingual community support. We provide innovative online spot and derivatives trading services, mining and staking products, as well as API support, to retail and institutional clients around the world, and strive to be the most reliable exchange for the emerging digital asset class.

Our core values define us. We listen, care, and improve to create a faster, fairer, and more humane trading environment for our users. Our innovative, highly advanced, user-friendly platform has been designed from the ground-up using best-in-class infrastructure to provide our users with the industry's safest, fastest, fairest, and most transparent trading experience. Built on customer-centric values, we endeavour to provide a professional, 24/7 multi-language customer support to help in a timely manner.
As of today, Bybit is one of the most trusted, reliable, and transparent cryptocurrency derivatives platforms in the space.
Job Overview

We are seeking a data-driven professional with extensive hands-on experience in big data analytics to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for transforming complex datasets into clear, actionable insights that drive strategic business decisions. This role requires strong technical proficiency in data analytics tools, programming languages, and visualization platforms, along with the ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment. The candidate should demonstrate exceptional problem-solving skills, analytical thinking, and the ability to deliver accurate, insightful reports that support business growth and operational efficiency.
Job Responsibilities

1. Based on business goals and business models, establish a comprehensive, accurate, and objective indicator system and monitoring and analysis framework. At the same time, based on the business monitoring and analysis framework, clearly understand the overall business situation and locate business issues;

2. Through thematic analysis, conduct in-depth analysis of business issues, provide data support and decision-making basis for company operational decisions, marketing strategies, product directions, etc.;

3. Precipitation analysis method and monitoring framework, extract data product requirements, collaborate with relevant teams (such as development team, product team) and promote the landing of data products;
4. Collaborate with relevant teams to organize training and sharing of concepts, skills, methods, and tools related to data technology.
Job Requirements
1. Bachelor's degree or above in statistics, mathematics, information technology, or economics, with 3-5 years of relevant work experience;
2. Experience in digital currency, internet, and e-commerce is preferred;
3. Good logical analysis ability and data sensitivity, able to extract core results from massive data, timely discover and analyze deep changes and root causes behind business appearances;
4. Proficient in data extraction tools such as SQL, proficient in operating tools such as Excel, PPT, Tableau, etc.;
5. Strong logical thinking ability, outstanding language expression ability, proficient in independently writing business Data Analysis reports;
6. Good business knowledge and understanding of business mechanisms and models, able to insight into business opportunities from the perspective of business development;
7. Outstanding communication and teamwork skills, with certain XFN and cross-team project experience, able to independently promote project execution.
8. Fluent English skills
9. Strong adaptability and time management skills to thrive in a fast-paced work environment
company_box_content: Bybit 成立于 2018 年 3 月，如今已发展成为业界领先的加密货币交易所，为个人和机构交易者量身打造了一系列加密货币服务和产品解决方案。作为全球千万用户的信赖之选，Bybit 持续突破创新疆界，不断对多元化产品服务进行迭代升级。

head: Financial Performance Analyst
info: 中国 江苏省 宜兴市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 18 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Location: 江苏省宜兴经济开发区杏里路16号
A Snapshot of Your Day

To support the Controlling Manager in driving financial transparency, forecast reliability, and digital transformation by analyzing performance data, preparing reports, and applying advanced analytics tools to improve decision-making across SGTC operations.
How You’ll Make An Impact
Monthly Financial Reporting
Prepare monthly financial performance reports across SGTC business units, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely delivery.
Performance Analysis & Forecasting
Analyze financial results by comparing actuals, forecasts, and budgets.
Identify key performance drivers and provide actionable insights.
Proactively drive process improvements to support the achievement of financial KPIs.
Cost Center Management
Prepare cost center reports, monitor and analyze cost center expenses, and collaborate with other departments to ensure spending remains within budget and aligned with financial targets.
Digitalization & Analytics
Act as the digitalization specialist within the controlling department.
Apply IT tools such as Tableau, Alteryx, and other analytics platforms to enhance financial analysis and reporting.
Lead initiatives to automate reporting processes, improve data visualization, and support the team’s digital transformation.
Ad-hoc Assignments
Perform other ad-hoc tasks and analysis as required by the Controlling Manager or business needs.
What You Bring
Bachelor’s or master’s degree in accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related major
3-5 years working experience in financial analysis or controlling, preferably in the manufacturing or factory environment.
Strong analytical skills and proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP, and BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Alteryx).
Experience with forecasting, budgeting, and variance analysis.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Fluent in English and Mandarin.
Who is Siemens Energy?

At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With ~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation.

Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.
Our Commitment to Diversity

Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity we generate power. We run on inclusion and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.
1.  Monthly Financial Reporting
1.  Performance Analysis & Forecasting
1.  Cost Center Management
1.  Digitalization & Analytics
1.  Ad-hoc Assignments
1.  Bachelor’s or master’s degree in accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related major
2.  3-5 years working experience in financial analysis or controlling, preferably in the manufacturing or factory environment.
3.  Strong analytical skills and proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP, and BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Alteryx).

company_box_content: Siemens Energy is one of the world’s leading energy technology companies. The company works with its customers and partners on energy systems for the future, thus supporting the transition to a more sustainable world. With its portfolio of products, solutions and services, Siemens Energy covers almost the entire energy value chain – from power generation and transmission to storage. The portfolio includes conventional and renewable energy technology, such as gas and steam turbines, hybrid power plants operated with hydrogen, and power generators and transformers. A majority stake in the wind power subsidiary Siemens Gamesa Renewable Energy (SGRE) makes Siemens Energy a global market leader for renewable energies. An estimated one-sixth of the electricity generated worldwide is based on technologies from Siemens Energy. Siemens Energy employs 103,000 people worldwide in more than 90 countries and generated revenue of around €39.1 billion in fiscal year 2025.
Siemens Energy is a trademark licensed by Siemens AG

head: 战略分析师 Strategy Analyst
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 1 个月前 · 89 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Company:

Futu Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: FUTU) is an advanced technology company transforming the investing experience by offering fully digitalized financial services. Through its proprietary digital platforms,
Futubull
and
moomoo

, the Company provides a full range of investment services, including trade execution and clearing, margin financing and securities lending, and wealth management. The Company has embedded social media tools to create a network centered around its users and provide connectivity to users, investors, companies, analysts, media and key opinion leaders. The Company also provides corporate services, including IPO distribution, investor relations and ESOP solution services.

Futu was founded in Hong Kong in 2012 and listed on Nasdaq in 2019. Futu has over 27 million users globally and is the #1 retail stock broker in Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia. As of June 30, 2025, Futu had approximately HK$1 trillion in total client assets.
Key Responsibilities:

1. Strategic Leadership: Partner with key executives of subsidiaries/business lines to architect business strategies, design product roadmaps, define brand differentiation, and co-lead high-impact strategic decisions.
2. Market-Driven Execution: Conduct deep financial market analysis and collaborate with local teams to develop agile, data-informed marketing strategies aligned with macroeconomic trends.
3. Performance Architecture: Design and implement KPI frameworks that balance short-term execution with sustainable market health.
4. Value Optimization: Develop pricing models and competitive positioning strategies to maximize revenue while achieving strategic objectives.
5. Growth Catalyst: Identify and evaluate inorganic growth opportunities (M&A, partnerships, JVs), taking lead of due diligence and supporting strategic investment execution.
6. Executive Alignment: Interface directly with the Group Decision Committee to align regional strategy with global priorities and execute mission-critical initiatives.
Requirements
1. Bachelor’s degree or above with near-native English proficiency.
2. 2-4 years of experience in evaluating later-stage projects in PE and VC firms (consumer facing sectors preferred). Proven track record in operationalizing strategies.
3. Active investor of Hong Kong / U.S. stocks and closely follows market development.
4. Demonstrated ability to deconstruct complex business issues, identify leverage points, and deliver actionable insights under ambiguity.
5. Self-directed operator who rapidly masters new domains and delivers CEO-ready strategic recommendations.
6. Exceptional written/verbal communication skills with experience presenting to C-suite stakeholders.
7. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams across geographies and organizational layers to drive consensus and execution.
8. Relentless commitment to strategic excellence, with personal pride in delivering boardroom-quality insights that directly impact business outcomes.
company_description: A technology company transforming investing through digital platforms like Futubull and moomoo, with over 27 million users globally. It offers investment services, corporate services, and social media tools for financial markets.

head: Strategy Analyst
info: 中国 北京市 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Are you a data detective who loves turning numbers into narratives and insights into action? Do you get a thrill from uncovering the "why" behind business trends and using that knowledge to shape strategy?
We are looking for a sharp and driven
Product Analyst to empower our teams with data-driven intelligence working at our HQ in Dubai, UAE

. In this role, you will be the cornerstone of decision-making, providing the analytical firepower that guides our product roadmap and business strategy. You'll go beyond reporting—you'll be a strategic partner, using data to identify opportunities, mitigate risks, and tell the story of where we should go next.
If you have a consultant's problem-solving skills and a passion for the product lifecycle, this is your opportunity to make a tangible impact.
What You'll Do:
1. Analyze complex datasets, core metrics, and business drivers to generate actionable insights that answer our most pressing questions.
2. Develop and maintain intuitive dashboards, reports, and analytical frameworks that empower teams across the company to make smarter, faster decisions.
3. Partner directly with Product Managers and business leaders to identify growth opportunities, potential risks, and areas for optimization.
4. Provide research and analysis on market trends and leverage AI-driven analytical techniques to keep us at the forefront of innovation.
Who You Are (Qualifications):
1. You have experience in a highly analytical role (e.g., Business Analyst, Data Analyst, Strategy Analyst) within a consulting firm, tech company, or product-led organization.

2. You possess a strong quantitative background and are proficient in SQL, Python, R, or other data analysis tools. Experience with data visualization platforms (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Power BI) is essential.
3. You are a structured problem-solver who breaks down complex, ambiguous problems into actionable steps—consulting experience is a major plus.
4. You take ownership of your work from start to finish, demonstrating accountability for your insights and their impact.
5. You have an enterprise mindset: you're resilient, proactive, and have the drive to "find a way" to get to the answer.
Ideal Backgrounds Include:
1. Former analysts from top-tier consulting firms with exposure to tech, data, or AI projects.
2. Analysts from product-first organizations (e.g., tech-enabled consumer companies, SaaS businesses) who are skilled at partnering with product teams.
Why Join Us?
1. Strategic Influence: Your analysis will directly inform key product and business decisions, giving you a front-row seat to our strategy.
2. Skill Growth: Hone your technical skills while developing deep business acumen and strategic thinking in a high-impact environment.
3. Collaborative Culture: Join a team that values curiosity, intellectual rigor, and data-driven debate.
About Us-
Landmark Group

Our journey started in 1973 with a single store in Bahrain. Since then, we have grown into a global retail and hospitality group. The proud creator of 25 plus value led, own-built brands across retail, hospitality, food, and leisure.

Over the years, our UAE - based group has evolved into a comprehensive retail and hospitality entity, with over 2200 retail stores, leisure, and hospitality outlets, panning the GCC, Middle East, India, Southeast Asia, and Africa. Today, Landmark Group is one of GCC's largest omnichannel retailers and India's top home and fashion retailer.

We take immense pride in the organic growth of our retail brands, which have blossomed into household names. From Max, Splash, Babyshop, Centrepoint, Shoemart, Home Centre, Emax, Fitness First, to Fun City, to name a few, our brands span across a multitude of categories, enriching the lives of countless families over the past decade.
As a part of the Landmark Group, a renowned retail and hospitality conglomerate in the Middle East, North Africa, and India,
Landmark Digital is the dynamic digital arm of Landmark Retail,
serving as the cornerstone of our omnichannel business strategy.

Headquartered in Dubai, UAE, we oversee the digital operations of eight leading brands across diverse geographies, with ambitious plans for expansion into new territories and functions. Joining us means becoming a vital part of the Middle East's most significant bricks-to-clicks success story, boasting an impressive year-on-year growth rate exceeding 100%.

Comprising a talented workforce of over 700 professionals across diverse domains, Landmark Digital spearheads various functions including Enterprise and E-commerce Tech, Product Management, User Design, and MarTech, among others. With our futuristic outlook, we are committed to delivering seamless digital experiences to our customers.
Landmark Digital
At
Landmark Digital,
we cultivate an
agile work culture

, empowering you to make impactful decisions from day one within collaborative squads comprising professionals from over 20 nationalities. Additionally, our dedicated software development center in Bangalore, India, offers opportunities for incubation, design, and optimization of digital products.
Working at Landmark Digital means
engaging with cutting-edge technologies

, including Enterprise and E-commerce tech, headless commerce, Java Spring Boot, React Native, React frontend, and Azure Cloud solutions, providing an enriching environment for professional growth and development.
In addition to
competitive remuneration and benefits
, we prioritize
continuous learning and growth
through dedicated training and upskilling initiatives. Furthermore, our
vibrant workplace culture
fosters camaraderie through various team events, celebrations, and recreational amenities, ensuring a fulfilling experience both personally and professionally.
Come be a part of Landmark Digital, where innovation, collaboration, and growth converge to redefine the digital retail landscape
company_box_content: Founded in 1973 in Bahrain, Landmark Group has grown to become one of the largest and most successful omnichannel retail and hospitality conglomerates, with presence across 17 countries in the Middle East, Africa, India and Southeast Asia. Based in the UAE since 1990, the Group owns and operates 21 established homegrown and 4 franchise brands across an extensive network of more than 2,200 outlets, encompassing a gross leasable area of 30 million square feet.

Landmark Group's success is driven by its diverse portfolio of established brands, across multiple retail categories, offering a comprehensive range of products across fashion, home, groceries and electronics. These include Centrepoint, Max Fashion, Home Centre, Babyshop, Splash, Shoemart, Lifestyle, Viva, Emax, Home Box, Styli, Shoexpress, Spar and Easybuy.

Beyond retail, Landmark Group has diversified into the leisure, fitness and hospitality sectors with brands like Fitness First, Citymax, Fun City, Fun Ville, Zafran and Carluccio’s. The Group boasts unparalleled logistics capabilities, owning the MENA region's largest privately-owned distribution hub - Omega Logistics and Logistiq, which offers state-of-the-art third-party logistics services.

Landmark Group places a strong emphasis on delivering exceptional value and achieving customer satisfaction throughout its comprehensive product range. Across its loyalty programmes, the Group enjoys a loyal customer base with more than 35 million active users.
The company has a dedicated workforce of more than 53,000 employees and continues to be certified as a Great Place to Work (GPTW) since 2017.

company_box_content: 4flow provides consulting, software and services for logistics and supply chain management. More than 1300 4flow team members leverage their supply chain expertise and IT know-how to best serve our customers at 20 locations around the world. Around the globe, we develop and implement lean and sustainable supply chain strategies for our clients’ businesses. Our clients come from a variety of industries including: vehicle manufacturers and suppliers, consumer goods and retail, industrial machinery manufacturers, medical technology, basic materials, spare parts, renewable energy, high-tech and telecommunications, and logistics service providers (LSP).
4flow and its customer AGCO were honored with the prestigious German Award for Supply Chain Management in 2016, presented by BVL International.

Our consulting expertise at 4flow ranges from implementing lean logistics, designing and optimizing networks, managing and optimizing transportation to improving inventory, managing international supply chains and customs processes as well as enhancing import and export processes.
4flow vista® is the standard software for supply chain design and optimization.

4flow research develops practical innovations, and conducts supply chain research relevant to the industry.

head: Business Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

This is a unique opportunity to be part of Rotork's transformation journey, partnering with key stakeholders to harmonize processes across geographies and business units, ensuring alignment with Rotork's core values and strategic objectives.

The Business Transformation function in Rotork is responsible for driving customer value, designing excellent company-wide business processes to support effective customer delivery and our Growth+ strategy.

Our Business Analysts play a critical role in bridging the gap between business needs and technical, strategic or operational solutions whilst delivering comprehensive analysis and insights across technological, strategic and operational programmes. Shaping the way Rotork operates by supporting the design, documentation, optimisation, and governance of business processes across the organisation.

We are looking for a Business Analyst with the ability to effectively communicate and build relationships with stakeholders across the enterprise to gather requirements for ongoing improvements within our core systems, processes and workflows whilst delivering Rotork’s overall transformation strategy.
Key Responsibilities
1. Translate business requirements into functional specifications, user stories and process flows to drive improvements across the business.
2. Define and document business processes, data flows, RACI models and system requirements to support business operation and transformation.
3. Facilitate workshops, interviews and working sessions to gather, document and validate business requirements.
4. Conduct gap analysis between current state and future state processes.
5. Designing, leading and implementing new processes and solution updates.
6. Partners closely with Product Owners, Process Owners and project teams to ensure alignment between business requirements, system requirements and the delivered change.
7. Support User Acceptance Testing, development of training materials and change management activities.
8. Advocate of the enterprise business process framework and building trusted business partner relationships.
Qualifications & Knowledge:

1. Degree in Business Information Systems, Management and Information Technology, Business Analytics, Information Systems Management, Business Administration with IT or Systems focus, Systems Engineering or a related field.
2. 3 – 5 years’ experience as a Business Analyst, preferably within complex corporate environments or multi-entity organizations.
3. Expert knowledge of structured process, innovation, problem-solving tools/methodologies and customer journey mapping. LEAN, Kaizen or Six Sigma background would be desirable.
Analytical & Critical Thinking
1. Skilled in requirements gathering, root cause and gap analysis, SWOT assessments, and structured decision-making to drive business improvements.
Data Interpretation & Insight Generation
1. Proficient in analysing large datasets and reports to extract actionable insights that inform strategic decisions.
Technical Proficiency
1. Experienced with tools like Microsoft Dynamics 365, Visio, Excel, Power BI, SQL, JIRA, and Azure DevOps; capable of creating process models, wireframes, and prototypes.
Project Delivery & Agile Methodologies
1. Demonstrated success in supporting digital transformations using Agile, Scrum, and hybrid approaches, including UAT, training, and change management.
Communication & Collaboration
1. Strong facilitation, stakeholder engagement, and communication skills; proactive, self-motivated, and effective at resolving issues and motivating teams.
company_box_content: Rotork is a FTSE-250 global leader in mission-critical flow control and instrumentation solutions, trusted by the world’s most essential industries - including oil & gas, water & wastewater, power generation, chemical processing, and industrial manufacturing.

With over 3,500 skilled employees, 18 strategically located assembly facilities, and a presence in more than 170 countries, Rotork delivers precision -engineered products and expert support wherever our customers operate. From our headquarters in Bath, UK, we coordinate a global network that ensures fast, reliable access to our solutions and services - no matter the location.

Our technologies help customers control and monitor the flow of liquids, gases, and other materials in the most demanding environments. But we don’t stop at delivery. We support our products for life - with comprehensive maintenance, repair, and upgrade services designed to maximise performance, safety, and sustainability across the entire lifecycle of a plant.

At Rotork, we’re driven by innovation, backed by decades of engineering excellence, and committed to helping industries operate more efficiently and responsibly. Whether enabling cleaner energy, safer water systems, or smarter industrial processes, our mission remains the same:
Rotork – Keeping the World Flowing for Future Generations.

职位描述
1、承接财务共享中心各部门的运营指标以及SLA的监控以及分析需求，辅助日常运营管理提升；
2、主动基于相关数据产出专项分析报告（例如差旅成本分析、审批流程效率等方向），支持集团财务相关制度的管理与修订决策；
3、通过数据分析，主动诊断及发现集团成本支出，现金管理等相关问题，并给出优化建议，赋能集团成本控制；
4、负责相关报告、数据分析的产品化，为集团各级部门提供费用与成本管理的监控、分析工具。
职位要求
1、本科及以上学历，5年以上数据分析相关工作经验，能够根据业务流程或业务需求快速搭指标体系并深度分析；
2、能够熟练使用SQL等工具独立进行日常数据分析；
3、有较好的跨团队、部门沟通协调能力；
4、有财务共享中心实施及咨询规划经验，或集团财务信息系统管理及运营经验，或集团共享中心精益运营管理经验优先；
5、能够使用英语作为工作语言。
company_description: This role involves financial data analysis, cost management, and process optimization within a finance shared services center. Responsibilities include monitoring KPIs, producing reports, and supporting decision-making for cost control.

head: 海外保险产品经理
info: 中国 北京市 海淀区 · 3 个月前 · 35 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
工作职责：
1、参与制定海外保险（车险及非车险）业务发展规划，负责海外保险产品的市场调研、用户需求分析、产品设计、产品迭代；
2、与保险机构对接、保险招采、承保理赔流程、投保理赔运营管理；
3、制定保险产品定制开发、上线、迭代管理制度、政策；
4、主导建立和优化保险产品管理及运营体系；
5、构建保险数据体系、经营分析体系、费率定价体系、赔付率预测体系，分析数据并撰写报告，为决策提供支持；
6、完成领导交办的其他任务。
任职要求任职要求：
1、本科及以上学历，具备较强的英语听说读写能力，可进行英语熟练交流；
2、5年以上保险经验，新能源海外车险工作经验优先，熟悉业务运作流程；
3、有主机厂海外项目工作经验优先，有独立项目管理和执行经验； 具备优秀的沟通协调能力和团队合作精神，有高度的责任感，有上进心和主动性，有较强的项目推动能力；
4、掌握丰富的车险承保、核保、精算定价及运营管理专业技能，熟悉相关监管政策和业务知识。 5、工作严谨负责，诚信敬业，具市场敏感度与商业意识。
company_box_content: 小米公司正式成立于2010年4月，是一家专注于高端智能手机、互联网电视以及智能家居生态链建设的创新型科技企业。“让每个人都能享受科技的乐趣”是小米公司的愿景。小米公司应用了互联网开发模式开发产品的模式，用极客精神做产品，用互联网模式干掉中间环节，致力于让全球每个人，都能享用来自中国的优质科技产品。
2017年，小米跨越千亿营收的门槛，小米手机销量成功逆转，始终坚持技术创新，发布了澎湃S1处理器芯片，小米MIX 2继续引领全面屏技术
通过庞大而先进的智能硬件生态链布局和持续投入的云服务，建起了全球最大的IOT平台，并且在国内AI领域率先取得落地产品的成功
国际化迅猛发展，在进入的70多个国家和地区中16个国家销量进入了前5位，其中印度连续两个季度稳居市场份额第一。
2018年小米新征程开启之年，欢迎你的加入。

head: Business Analyst商业分析师
info: 中国 上海市 · 4 周前 · 62 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

About WuXi XDC WuXi XDC Cayman Inc. (“WuXi XDC”, stock code: 2268.HK) is a leading global CRDMO focused on antibody drug conjugates (ADC) and the broader bioconjugate market. It provides end-to-end contract research, development and manufacturing services for bioconjugates, including ADCs. Its services cover antibody intermediates and other biologics intermediates, chemical payloads and linkers, as well as bioconjugate drug substances and drug products. WuXi XDC has been successful in bringing multiple ADC projects to the Investigational New Drug (IND) filing stage in 15 months or less, nearly cutting in half the traditional development timeline. As of June 2023, 110 on-going integrated projects are under development at WuXi XDC, including 47 post-IND bioconjugate projects, among which 16 projects are in phase II/III. For more information about WuXi XDC, please visit: https://wuxixdc.com
Responsibilities
1. Partner with the business development, proposals teams, project management and CMC team to analyze project information.
2. Serve as the subject matter expert for business data, translating raw data into actionable business intelligence
3. Present findings and recommendations clearly and persuasively to senior leadership to inform strategic decision-making
4. Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to track key commercial metrics
5. Conduct end-to-end analysis of critical business processes (e.g., from RFI ,client proposal to contract) to identify bottlenecks, and improve cycle times
Qualifications
1. Masters and above in business analysis, computer science, data science life science or a related field.
2. More than 2 years of experience as a business analyst, systems analyst, or similar role
3. Experience within the pharmaceutical, biotech, or CDMO industry is essential.
4. More than 2 years of experience as a business analyst, systems analyst, or similar role
5. Experience within the pharmaceutical, biotech, or CDMO industry is essential.
6. Fluent in Chinese and English
company_box_content: WuXi XDC is a leading CRDMO focused on the global ADC and broader bioconjugate market and is dedicated to providing integrated services from concept development to commercialization. All services are provided from proximately located, state-of-the-art laboratories and manufacturing facilities, providing high efficiency and significant reduction of development timeline and costs. Our community of over 1000 skilled employees work across a global network to provide an open-access platform with the most comprehensive capabilities and technologies.  WuXi XDC enables its biopharmaceutical partners to innovate, accelerate, and transform the development of the bioconjugate industry, to the benefit of patients worldwide.
展开
company_description: A leading CRDMO specializing in antibody drug conjugates (ADCs) and bioconjugates, with over 1,000 employees globally. It provides end-to-end services from research to commercialization, accelerating drug development timelines.

head: Assistant Manager, Commercial
info: 中国 上海市 · 3 周前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

1. Identify revenue optimization opportunities at franchise hotels and provide suggestions to hotel General Managers

8. Manage the hotel compliance of Accor’s defined Loyalty Operating Standards to ensure Loyalty Fees are optimized at all Franchise hotels
9. Participate in the corporate budgeting and rolling forecasting progress of franchise hotels
Knowledge and Experience
1. Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent
2. Min. 5 years of experience in hotel industry
3. Language Requirement: Fluent in Mandarin and English(verbal and written) is a must.
4. Good interpersonal and team working skills with ability to communicate with all levels of employees
5. Strong understanding of market influences and impacts on supply and demand
6. Excellent data analysis capability
7. Power Point design, good presentation and influencing skills
8. Flexible, able to embrace and respond to change effectively
9. Multicultural awareness and able to work with people from diverse cultures and backgrounds
10. Ability to work independently with strong initiative in a dynamic environment
11. Self-motivated and enthusiastic
company_box_content: We are Accor

We are more than 290,000 hospitality experts placing people at the heart of what we do, creating emotion for our guests, and nurturing passion for service and achievement beyond limits. Building on the strength of our teams and of our fully integrated ecosystem of leading brands, personalized services & expert solutions, we break new ground to reimagine hospitality and inspire new ways to experience the world.

We are dedicated to suit all desires and needs, and reinvent the guest experience every day with our 45 hotel brands across all segments- 5,600 properties around the world from luxury five-star palaces to smart economy hotels, exquisite residences to full-service resorts.

Because we take care of millions of guests and each of our hotels is a world in itself, where every action counts. We strive to make positive impact both locally and globally, to ensure hospitality benefits not only the few, but all.

head: Specialist, Business Insights - Shenzhen (商业数据与洞察专员 - 深圳)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 1 天前 · 50 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
HK Express is Hong Kong’s first and only low-cost carrier, always offering great value, affordable fares on one of the youngest and most modern aircraft fleets in the world.
Like you, and just like many people across Asia, we love to travel and discover new places across the world’s most diverse and dynamic region

and at HK Express, we’re opening up new travel experiences that inspire and invigorate millions of people across the region we’re proud to call home. Everything we do is focused on encouraging the spirit of adventure. Our routes provide the inspiration and spontaneity to try somewhere new, disrupting monotonous modern life. As we continue to open up new routes, often in secondary and emerging destinations, our passengers will gain access to an incredible range of places, exploring hidden gems and experiencing local cultures.
We have a diverse and vibrant team that embodies the adventurous spirit of our customers, and loves to travel too. Join us in this journey to make your career even more fulfilling and rewarding.
Overview

As a Specialist, Business Insights, you will collaborate closely with various teams within Commercial department to support their data needs. Your core responsibility is to transform commercial and customer data into actionable insights that drive business growth and enhance commercial performance. You will design, develop, and manage dashboards and reports, ensuring that data is presented clearly, accurately, and in a timely manner to empower informed decision-making across the organization.
Role Purpose
Dashboard Creation and Reporting
Develop and manage performance dashboards for the Commercial team, ensuring timely updates and accuracy.
Build tailored visualizations that enhance data interpretation and supports decision-making and performance accountability.
Develop reports and presentations that are concise, easy to understand, and effectively convey insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
Market Research, Competitive Analysis and Customer Insights
Analyse historical data to support decision making and assist to form recommendation on revenue and pricing strategy. Propose and evaluate actions to improve commercial performance.
Conduct market landscape research including competitive analysis, desktop research and benchmarking exercises.
Support to conduct in-depth research to identify emerging trends and consumer preferences.
Database Management and Maintenance
Work closely with Data Analytics team and support the formulation of data structure.
Support data extraction and ensure data integrity, accuracy, and security.
Propose improvements to database functionality, such as automation, data integration, and enhanced reporting capabilities.
Extract and analyze data to measure and report the effectiveness and ROI of commercial and omni-channel strategies.
Explore scope in expanding Customer data platform & personalisation capabilities in Greater Bay Area.
Data Analysis and Insights Generation

Analyse data from direct channels and other data sources to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities. Identify anomalies, and flag potential areas of concern. Prepare regular reports with insights and recommendations for optimisation.
Utilize Customer Experience Analytics and Digital Analytics tools to analyse digital experience, track user sessions, identify pain points, and uncover opportunities.

Implement data-driven improvements: Collaborate with the Digital Experience team to implement or test changes based on insights from aiming to improve website and app performance and drive conversion.
Analyze data from journey experience surveys and brand health trackers to identify key trends and issues, enabling timely actions and guiding long-term improvements through regular reporting.
Qualification
Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Business Administration, Economic, Finance, Accounting, or other quantitative discipline.
Strong analytical and numerical skills, with experience in quantitative/data analysis and handling large datasets ideally. And strong attention to details and accuracy
Demonstrate aptitude for logical analysis, analytical mind, problem identification, and problem solving.
Adaptable, quick learner, able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Effective communicator and presenter, with stakeholder management and interpersonal skills.
Skilled in project management, able to prioritize and deliver results under pressure and tight deadlines.
Experience with data visualization tools (Looker Studio, Tableau) and programming (SQL, Python, Google Cloud) is preferred.
Good command of Chinese and English, Cantonese is a valued addition.
Experience in Customer Data Platforms, Data Management Platforms or Marketing Automation Platforms in Mainland China will be advantageous
Experience and knowledge in data pipeline & integration will be beneficial
Desirable Qualities
Proactive, curious, detail-oriented self-starter with a growth mindset and interest in innovative solutions.
Comfortable influencing cross-functional teams and translating insights into actionable business decisions.
Strong project management skills and commitment to continuous improvement.
职位:
商业数据与洞察专员
地点:
深圳
汇报对象:
商业数据与洞察高级经理/经理
作为商业数据与洞察专员，您将与商务部团队密切协作，了解并满足他们的数据需求。您的核心职责是将商业与客户数据转化为可执行的洞察，推动业务增长并提升商业绩效。您将设计、开发和管理仪表板与报告，确保数据以清晰、准确、及时的方式呈现，以支持全组织的知情决策。
职责与工作内容:
Dashboard 仪表板创建与数据报告（商务洞察方向）
负责商业团队的仪表板创建与管理，确保数据更新及时、准确性高
根据业务需求定制可视化呈现，提升数据解读效率，支持决策与绩效追踪
编制简明扼要的商业报告与简报，清晰传达洞察与建议，突出关键发现、影响与行动建议
市场研究、竞争分析与客户洞察
通过市场研究、竞争对手分析和客户洞察，支持商业决策与策略制定，辅助决策并提出定价策略的优化建议
进行市场景观研究，包括竞争分析、市场环境评估、桌面研究和基准测试
支持开展深入研究，识别新兴趋势与消费者偏好
数据库管理与性能优化
与数据分析团队密切合作，支持数据结构的制定与改进
协助数据提取，确保数据完整性、准确性与安全性
提出数据库功能改进建议，如自动化、数据集成和增强报告能力
提取并分析数据，以衡量和报告商业及全渠道策略的有效性和投资回报率
评估并推动客户数据平台及个性化服务能力在大湾区的落地与扩展
数据分析与洞察报告撰写
分析来自直接渠道及其他数据源的数据，识别模式、趋势与机会，标注异常并提出改进建议
借助客户体验分析和数字分析工具，分析体验、数字足迹、识别痛点并挖掘机会
与数字体验(客户体验)团队合作，基于洞察执行或测试改动，以提升网站和应用性能并推动转化。
分析客户旅程体验、品牌健康度评估等数据，识别关键趋势，定期汇报并推动持续优化及长期改进
任职资格
数学、统计学、计算机科学、工商管理、经济学、金融、会计或其他定量学科
较强的分析与数值能力，具备定量数据分析与处理大规模数据集的经验
具备逻辑分析、分析思维、问题识别与解决能力
适应性强、学习能力强，能在快节奏环境中独立工作并与团队协作
有效沟通与演示能力，具备利益相关者管理及人际交往技巧
项目管理能力，能在压力和紧迫的时限内优先排序并交付结果
有数据可视化工具经验（Looker Studio、Tableau）以及编程能力（SQL、Python、Google Cloud）者优先
中英文良好，粤语者为加分项
在中国大陆有客户数据平台、数据管理平台或营销自动化平台相关经验者优先
具备数据管道设计、开发与维护经验，能够支持复杂的数据集成流程者优先
理想素质
积极主动、好奇、注重细节，具备成长型思维，乐于寻求创
解决方案快速学习、对新工具与方法保持热情
跨文化沟通与协作能力，善于在多团队环境中推动进展
能够影响跨职能团队并将洞察转化为可执行的商业决策
强烈的项目管理能力，持续改进意识

head: Operation Analyst (Senior or Associate)
info: 中国 香港特别行政区 · 重新发布时间: 4 天前 · 89 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Title:
Operations Analyst
Job Summary:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Operations Analyst to support our business operations. The ideal candidate will handle a variety of administrative and operational tasks to ensure smooth workflows, effective communication, and organized office management. This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to coordinate across multiple teams.
Roles & Responsibilities:
Support in Finance team
1. Review timesheet and communicate with staff
2. Consolidate and maintain OT summary to Partners and Managers
3. Prepare staff utilisation reports
4. Manage filing and document control
Office management
1. Order and restock office supplies and refreshments
2. Arrange office equipment maintenance
3. Ensure common areas organised
4. Manage correspondence and mails
5. Support group activities / events
6. Provide other administrative support
Meeting logistics support
1. Coordinate and schedule Partners and Managers meetings
2. Manage meeting room and facilities booking and logistics
Staff support
1. Allocate and manage workstation, lockers and keys
2. Provide general administration support to staff members and engagement teams
Requirements:
1. Higher diploma or above (University qualification is not a must)
2. Being able to read and write both Chinese and English, as well as speak Cantonese, English and Putonghua
3. Proven experience in administrative, operational, or office management roles preferred
4. Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
5. Proficient with Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint) and comfortable with various office management systems and procedures
6. Detail-oriented with the ability to manage mass data
7. Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team
company_description: This role involves administrative and operational support, including finance coordination, office management, and staff assistance. Responsibilities focus on ensuring smooth workflows and effective communication within the organization.

head: Assistant Data Program Manager
info: 中国 陕西省 神木市 · 重新发布时间: 16 小时前 · 2 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
We are seeking a Assistant Data Program Manager.
As an Assistant Data Program Manager your main responsibilities will involve:
Act as the local owner and coordinator of data/AI initiatives.
Implement and localize data solutions, tools, and systems developed by the regional or group data teams.
Identify opportunities to leverage global/regional data products to solve local business challenges and drive adoption.
Partner with business stakeholders to translate needs into actionable data initiatives.
Manage project plans, timelines, and communication between local business units and regional data teams.
Collaborate closely with regional and global stakeholders to ensure alignment and smooth integration of group data/AI tools.
Track program KPIs, prepare executive updates, and ensure timely, high-quality delivery of data initiatives.

Serve as a data ambassador, building enthusiasm for data-driven decision-making within teams. Promote group data solutions, champion data use cases, and increase data literacy and awareness across business units.
Foster collaboration between data engineering, analytics, and business teams to ensure seamless integration of solutions.
Maintain and enhance existing Python-based tools and automations developed in previous projects.
Your Skills And Experience
As an Assistant Data Program Manager your skills and qualifications will ideally include:
Master degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related field, and 6+ years of experience in data project or program management, preferably in a multinational or regional context.
Strong understanding of data ecosystems, including data pipelines, warehousing, and analytics platforms.
Proficiency in Python for maintaining and enhancing existing tools.
Experience with data visualization and BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, or similar).
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate across regional and group structures.
Fluent in English
knowledge of Cantonese or Mandarin is an advantage.
Why Zurich
At Zurich, we like to think outside the box and challenge the status quo. We take an optimistic approach by focusing on the positives and constantly asking What can go right?
We are an equal opportunity employer who knows that each employee is unique - that’s what makes our team so great!
Join us as we constantly explore new ways to
protect our customers and the planet
Location(s): HK - Hong Kong, CN - Guang Zhou, Pazhou, CN - Shen Zhen, Futian
Remote working: Hybrid

head: Analyst(Data Developer)-Regulatory &Financial Risk-GDC -Chongqing(315159)
info: 中国 重庆市 重庆市 · 2 周前 · 2 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Pursue a Career with Impact

At Deloitte China, we are on a mission to nurture and empower our people to become deep subject matter experts. We offer the perfect platform to unleash your full potential and equip you to thrive on challenges, and partner with our clients to solve their most complex problems. A world of opportunities awaits. Start your adventure and journey with us.
About The Business

We help clients manage regulatory compliance, enforcement actions, financial crime, and other regulatory investigation related matters (excluding the practice of law). These services are usually in support of the Chief Compliance Officer, Chief Operating Officer, Internal Legal Counsel, External Legal Counsel or other designated client leaders responsible for regulatory, compliance, and financial crime issues, delivered through:
Regulatory & Compliance
Financial Industry Risk & Regulatory
Financial Crime
Work you'll do
数据处理与分析：根据业务分析师提出的需求，对数据进行清洗、转换和整合，确保数据的准确性和可用性；运用 SQL、Python 等工具，为风险管理决策提供有力支持；
统计建模与算法开发：根据业务分析师提出的模型设计方案，构建各类统计模型，如信用风险评估模型、预期信用损失模型等；开发和优化数据分析算法，为风险识别和预警提供科学依据；
项目协作与沟通：与业务分析师、客户等紧密合作，将业务问题转化为可执行的数据解决方案；
数据可视化与报告撰写：运用 Tableau、PowerBI等可视化工具，将数据分析结果以直观易懂的图表、报告形式呈现，为业务决策提供清晰的可视化支持；
技术支持与优化：维护和优化数据处理流程和模型，及时解决项目中出现的数据问题。

During your tenure with us, you will demonstrate and develop your leadership and professional capabilities in the following areas: Inspiring, Creating purpose, Driving agility, Building diverse capability, Influencing, Collaborating, Delivering value, Building the business, Analytical acumen, Effective communication, Engagement management/delivery excellence, Managing change, Managing quality & risk, Sales excellence, Strategic thinking and problem solving, and Tech savviness.
We are looking for someone with
计算机相关专业，本科及以上学历；
具备数据分析能力，具备代码基础，熟练掌握Python等语言；
熟练掌握SQL语言，能够熟练进行数据查询、清洗和管理；
具有良好的团队协作精神，能够与不同的人员进行有效的沟通和协作，工作认真负责，具有较强的学习能力，能够快速适应新的技术和业务需求
Shape your future through impact that matters

For more than 100 years of history, Deloitte witnessed also had the honor to be part of the economic boom in China by providing industry-leading audit & assurance, consulting, risk advisory, financial advisory, tax & business advisory services to nearly 90% of the Fortune Global 500 Chinese companies and thousands of private companies. Deloitte China today carries on our centenary professionalism and strives to become the undisputed leader in professional services in China with strong responsibility and capabilities in digitalization and multidisciplinary services.
Deloitte has been named China's Top Employer since 2006, Universum's Most Attractive Employer in China since 2008, and the Best Workplaces in Greater China since 2019.

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of their background, experience, identity, ability or thinking style, and if you need assistance during the application process for accessibility reasons this is available upon request. The preferred candidate will be subject to background screening by Deloitte China or by their external third-party provider.
Accessibility assistance
If you need assistance or an accommodation during the recruitment process for accessibility reasons, there will be an opportunity for you to let us know what you need once you begin your application.
Ready to take on new challenges? Apply now!
Stay connected for the latest career opportunities, follow us on
Deloitte China Social Media
Why Deloitte China?
Deloitte China delivers a comprehensive range of audit & assurance, consulting, financial advisory, risk advisory and tax services to local, multinational and growth enterprise clients in China.
We are the
world's largest professional services firm
that changes the world, we lead with purpose and shared values.
We are the
market leader with digital and innovative solutions
, we create values for client through our multi-disciplinary services.
We are recognized as
Top Employer
in China by the Top Employers Institute* for 14th consecutive years, and made the top 3 for the first time this year!
We are certified as one of the
‘Best Workplaces™

head: Data Scientist
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 2 周前 · 58 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description
ABOUT NIELSENIQ

NielsenIQ is a global measurement and data analytics company that provides the most complete and trusted view available of consumers and markets worldwide. We provide consumer packaged goods manufacturers/fast-moving consumer goods and retailers with accurate, actionable information and insights and a complete picture of the complex and changing marketplace that companies need to innovate and grow. Our approach marries proprietary NielsenIQ data with other data sources to help clients around the world understand what’s happening now, what’s happening next, and how to best act on this knowledge. We like to be in the middle of the action. That’s why you can find us at work in over 90 countries, covering more than 90% of the world’s population. For more information, visit www.niq.com.

NielsenIQ is committed to hiring and retaining a diverse workforce. We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action-Employer, making decisions without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability status, age, marital status, protected veteran status or any other protected class.
Job Description
Job Description
Scope:
The DC team is at the intersection between Client Team and the Data Science Team. Together, you will actively work with both stakeholders.
Markets : Greater China and possibly some projects in Asia Pacific Region
Global/regional/ local: Sub-Regional/Local
Purpose of the role:
Being the key contact point between data science and commercial teams, helping commercial team to understand the retail products and the methodology behind it.
Supporting the clients’ business needs and driving internal product enhancement at the same time.
Analyzing large amounts of data captured by NielsenIQ’s research team to arrive at insights regarding trends as well as opportunities for further study/drilldown.

Working hand in hand with the client to explain to them the specific aspects of the studies being undertaken and help the client better understand the data in a more intelligible way through a simple, but effective methodology.
Respond to client questions regarding data irregularities and help the client understand the methodology being employed by NielsenIQ’s statistical tools.
Create clear insights and examples, either through visualizations or through raw data analysis in order to answer the main question of WHY the data is behaving a certain way.
Engage and align with multiple stakeholders on data requirements as well as in design for new studies.
Testing new methods, softwares and workflows constantly and checking if they can improve productivity.
Main Accountabilities:
Work closely with key account clients to ensure that their data requirements are satisfied and that they are satisfied with NielsenIQ’s retail analysis methodology.
Conduct various studies within departments in NielsenIQ for updating, improving and creating new data requirements for the client.
Understand client requirements and translate them into intelligent insights by creatively using NielsenIQ’s data.
Contribute to creating best practices for the country/ cluster/ region and sharing them with other data departments
Improve the product through active inputs and engagement with the Data Science team.
Qualifications

NIQ is the world’s leading consumer intelligence company, delivering the most complete understanding of consumer buying behavior and revealing new pathways to growth. In 2023, NIQ combined with GfK, bringing together the two industry leaders with unparalleled global reach. With a holistic retail read and the most comprehensive consumer insights—delivered with advanced analytics through state-of-the-art platforms—NIQ delivers the Full View™. NIQ is an Advent International portfolio company with operations in 100+ markets, covering more than 90% of the world’s population.

job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Position Description
1. Oversee the end-to-end project lifecycle for national business center initiatives, proactively resolve bottlenecks, and ensure delivery objectives are met.
2. Drive the implementation of key project processes, continuously optimize workflows, and improve overall efficiency.
3. Establish mechanisms to enhance collaboration among project stakeholders, and institutionalize lessons learned and best practices.
4. Participate in designing and executing project plans to ensure successful implementation.
Job Requirements
1. Familiarity with the cross-border e-commerce industry; at least 2 years of project management experience.
2. Proficient in at least one project management tool (e.g., Jira, Asana, Trello) with proven case studies of practical application; strong data-driven analysis and insight capabilities.
3. Excellent time management, prioritization skills, and ability to efficiently organize meetings.

4. Strong initiative, learning agility, and communication/collaboration skills; proactive in identifying collaboration issues, quick to adapt to new knowledge and environmental changes; prior experience in project mechanism & culture operations is a plus.
5. Project management professional certification (e.g., PMP, ACP) is preferred.
6. Fluent in English, capable of simultaneous interpretation in meetings, and proficient in writing/translation of work documents; overseas study or work experience is a plus.

head: Digital Marketing Expert (GEO/SEO)
info: 中国 澳门特别行政区 · 1 周前 · 21 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Purpose:

We are seeking a strategic and analytical GEO Expert to pioneer and lead our Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategy. This pivotal role is designed to enhance our brand's visibility and information accuracy across key AI platforms - including China AI agents (DeepSeek, Doubao etc.) and leading international platforms like ChatGPT and Gemini - while providing end-to-end oversight of GEO initiatives. The ideal candidate will possess a unique blend of solid GEO/SEO expertise, deep understanding of AI platform mechanisms, fundamental knowledge of social media platforms, and strong data analysis and insight capabilities. This combination will ensure optimal online visibility, consistent brand representation, and efficient cross-channel synergy.
Key Responsibilities
GEO Strategy Development & Agency Management
1. Develop and lead the execution of the brand's overall Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategy, defining core objectives and KPIs.
2. Act as the primary liaison, providing comprehensive management of the external GEO agency to ensure all deliverables meet expectations, timelines, and quality standards.
3. Lead key project milestone reviews, ensuring diagnostic insights and optimization strategies are effectively implemented.
Paid Media Strategy & Performance (with Douyin Focus)
1. Develop and oversee the integrated paid media strategy.
2. Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across key social platforms, with a specialized focus on Douyin, from budget allocation and targeting to creative direction and performance analysis.
3. Leverage deep understanding of the social media ecosystem (especially short video platforms) to inform both paid and organic content strategy.
Content Ecosystem & Technical Architecture Optimization
1. Guide and approve AI-friendly content strategies, optimizing the information architecture and textual expression of the official website and core digital assets.
2. Collaborate with the tech team to oversee and drive technical optimizations of the website's code and structure for search engines and AI crawlers.
User Insight, Prompt Strategy & Data-Driven Execution
1. Guide the development of core user personas and content topics based on brand and market data, driving their continuous iteration across both GEO and paid media strategies.
2. Lead the design, testing, and refinement of effective prompt frameworks and libraries tailored to various AI platforms to accurately guide AI outputs.
3. Establish a unified performance monitoring system for GEO and paid media, regularly analyzing data to extract actionable insights and drive strategic optimization.
4. Champion the adoption of internal AI-friendliness diagnostic tools, enabling the content team to perform self-service diagnostics and optimizations.
Competencies and Requirements:
Core Competencies
1. Strategic Thinking & Business Acumen: Ability to align GEO and paid media strategies with overall business objectives and quantify the impact of initiatives on business growth.
2. Exceptional Project & Agency Management: Proven capability to manage multiple complex projects and external partnerships simultaneously while maintaining high standards and meeting deadlines.
3. Data-Driven & Analytical Mindset: High proficiency in data analysis with the ability to distill key insights from complex information to drive strategic optimization.
4. Outstanding Communication & Influence: Excellent ability to articulate complex concepts clearly to team members at all levels and drive cross-functional collaboration.
5. Proactivity & Growth Mindset: Maintains strong curiosity about the AI and marketing technology landscape, proactively learning and applying emerging trends and best practices.

6. Resilience & Execution Excellence: A team player who thrives in a high-pressure environment, responding quickly to demands. Combines patience, meticulous attention to detail, and the ability to work independently to drive projects from concept to completion.
Experience/ Knowledge/Certificates:

1. 7+ years of experience in digital marketing, with at least 3 years specifically focused on SEO/GEO strategy, coupled with proven success in managing social media and paid media budgets and strategy.
2. Deep understanding of major AI platforms and hands-on experience with prompt optimization.
3. High proficiency with data analytics tools and the ability to independently extract, analyze, and report on data.
4. Solid knowledge of the social media ecosystem, including content distribution logic and paid advertising mechanics, with a strong focus on Douyin.
Education:
Bachelor’s degree or above, preferably in Marketing, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.
Language Ability:
Good written and spoken English and Chinese
**Position Title depends on experience

info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 1 周前 · 15 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Responsibilities

1. Recommendation System Optimization: Responsible for the development and optimization of personalized recommendation algorithms for e-commerce platforms, including product recommendations, content recommendations, event recommendations, and service recommendations, aiming to improve user conversion rates and retention.
2. Search Ranking Algorithms: Design and implement e-commerce search ranking algorithms to optimize search relevance, click-through rates, and conversion rates, enhancing the user search experience.

3. Sales Forecasting and Inventory Optimization: Develop time-series algorithms such as sales forecasting to support supply chain optimization, store scheduling, intelligent replenishment, and other business decisions.

4. Large Model Applications: Familiar with the use cases and capability boundaries of state-of-the-art large models (language/multimodal), with skills in engineering calls, prompt engineering, context engineering, and basic fine-tuning.

5. Algorithm Engineering: Proficient in building data pipelines for algorithm models, code deployment, and algorithm serving, with data engineering and backend engineering capabilities to support algorithm implementation.
6. Open Source Integration: Capable of applying and customizing cutting-edge open source projects, skilled at identifying synergies between outstanding open source technologies and business needs.
Job Requirements
1. Education: Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics, Statistics, or related fields
2. Work Experience: More than 2 years of algorithm development experience
candidates with backgrounds in e-commerce or the internet industry are preferred
3. Technical Skills:
1. Proficient in at least one programming language such as Python, Java, or C++
2. Understanding of current SOTA large model trends and familiar with large model application platforms (such as Bailian, Qianfan, etc.)
3. Familiar with mainstream machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, etc.)
4. Solid foundation in machine learning and deep learning theories, familiar with commonly used algorithms (LR, GBDT, DNN, Graph Neural Networks, etc.)
5. Familiar with big data processing technologies (Hadoop, Spark, Flink, etc.)
6. Good foundation in data structures and algorithms
